Baue achtsam, zeige stolz und genieße den meditativen Prozess, die Schönheit der Natur Stein für Stein zu konstruieren. Perfekt für Pflanzenliebhaber, Heimdekorateure und Erwachsene, die durch schöne Bauprojekte kreative Entspannung suchen.
themeDescriptions.Braille Bricks: Lerne durch Berührung mit LEGO® Braille Bricks! Diese innovative Bildungsinitiative lehrt blinden und sehbehinderten Kindern Braille durch Spiel. Jeder Stein verfügt über Noppen, die Braille-Buchstaben und -Zahlen entsprechen, mit gedruckten Buchstaben, damit sehende Lehrer und Gleichaltrige nebenbei lernen können. Braille Bricks verwandelt Alphabetisierungslernen in taktiles, ansprechendes Spiel und fördert inklusive Bildung. Obwohl hauptsächlich über Bildungspartner statt im Einzelhandel verteilt, repräsentieren diese Sets LEGOs Engagement für Barrierefreiheit. Perfekt für Pädagogen, die Braille unterrichten, Familien mit sehbehinderten Kindern und zur Förderung inklusiven Lernens.
themeDescriptions.Brick Sketches: Erstelle ikonische Porträts mit LEGO® Brick Sketches! Diese Mosaik-artigen Sets lassen dich flache, stilisierte Porträts geliebter Charaktere aus Star Wars™, Marvel, DC und mehr bauen. Auf dekorativen Rahmen mit Namensschildern montiert, dienen Brick Sketches als künstlerische Wanddekoration, die Popkultur-Ikonen feiert. Mit kräftigen Farben und vereinfachten Designs bieten diese Sets schnelle, zufriedenstellende Bauten, die beeindruckend aussehen. Perfekt für Fans, die Charakterkunst wollen, Sammler, die erschwingliche Ausstellungsstücke suchen, und Baumeister, die Mosaik-artige Konstruktion lieben.
themeDescriptions.BrickHeadz: Baue ikonische Charaktere im LEGO® BrickHeadz-Stil! Diese sammelwürdigen Konstruktionscharaktere verfügen über übergroße Köpfe, kompakte Körper und sofort erkennbare Designs. Von Superhelden und Filmcharakteren bis zu saisonalen Figuren und Haustieren verwandeln BrickHeadz geliebte Charaktere in bezaubernde, stilisierte Bauten. Jede Figur steht auf einer Grundplatte zur Ausstellung und schafft eine einheitliche Sammlungsästhetik. Mit Hunderten von Charakteren, die seit 2016 veröffentlicht wurden, kombinieren BrickHeadz Bauzufriedenheit mit Sammelappeal. Perfekt für Charaktersammler, Schreibtischdekorateure und Baumeister, die niedliche, ausstellbare Modelle lieben.
themeDescriptions.BrickLink: Entdecke von Fans entworfene Exzellenz mit LEGO® BrickLink-Sets! Diese Kategorie umfasst von der Community erstellte Designs, die zu offiziellen LEGO-Produkten werden. Ähnlich wie LEGO Ideas, aber mit unterschiedlichen Auswahlprozessen, präsentieren BrickLink-Sets die unglaubliche Kreativität erwachsener Fans. Von detaillierten mittelalterlichen Gebäuden bis zu nostalgischen Tributen an den klassischen Weltraum repräsentieren diese Sets die Leidenschaft und das Können der LEGO-Community. Perfekt für erwachsene Baumeister, Sammler, die Fan-Designer unterstützen, und diejenigen, die einzigartige Sets suchen, die von Mitentusiasten erstellt wurden.
themeDescriptions.BrickLink Designer Program: Feiere Fan-Kreativität mit LEGO® BrickLink Designer Program Minifiguren! Diese einzigartige Initiative ermöglicht es LEGO-Fans, Sets zu entwerfen, die zu offiziellen Produkten werden. Ausgewählte Designs durchlaufen Community-Voting, wobei Gewinner in begrenzten Mengen produziert und exklusiv über BrickLink verkauft werden. Minifiguren in diesen Sets spiegeln die vielfältige Kreativität der erwachsenen Fan-Community von LEGO wider, von mittelalterlichen Schmieden bis zu Fantasy-Charakteren und historischen Figuren. Jede BrickLink Designer Program Veröffentlichung zeigt außergewöhnliche Bautechniken und fantasievolles Charakterdesign. Diese exklusiven Minifiguren repräsentieren echte Fan-Zusammenarbeit mit LEGO und verwandeln Community-Träume in Realität. Mit begrenzten Produktionsläufen werden sie sofort zu Sammlerstücken. Perfekt für LEGO-Enthusiasten, die Fan-Kreativität schätzen, einzigartige Designs und die Unterstützung der Visionen von Mitbaumeistern, die zu offiziellen LEGO-Sets werden.
themeDescriptions.Build Together: Teile die Freude am Bauen mit LEGO® Build Together Sets! Diese Initiative fördert kollaborative Bauerlebnisse für Familien, Klassenzimmer und Gemeinschaften. Sets in dieser Kategorie fördern Teamwork, Kommunikation und gemeinsame Kreativität durch Bauaktivitäten, die für mehrere Teilnehmer konzipiert sind. Perfekt für Familien, die Qualitätszeit zusammen suchen, Pädagogen, die kooperatives Lernen fördern, und Community-Programme, die LEGO als Teambuilding-Tool verwenden.
themeDescriptions.Building Bigger Thinking: Inspiriere junge Köpfe mit LEGO® Building Bigger Thinking Minifiguren! Diese Bildungsinitiative fördert Kreativität, Problemlösung und STEM-Lernen durch Bauen. Diese Minifiguren begleiten Sets, die dazu konzipiert sind, Experimentieren und innovatives Denken bei Kindern zu fördern. Anstatt strengen Anweisungen zu folgen, betont Building Bigger Thinking offene Konstruktion und Lernen durch Spiel. Figuren repräsentieren diverse Berufe und Hintergründe und inspirieren Kinder, sich selbst als Baumeister und Schöpfer zu sehen. Dieses Thema verbindet Unterhaltung und Bildung und macht Lernen durch praktisches Bauen mit Steinen Spaß. Mit Fokus auf kritisches Denken und kreatives Selbstvertrauen bereiten diese Sets Kinder auf zukünftige Herausforderungen vor. Perfekt für Eltern und Pädagogen, die Lernen durch Spiel schätzen und die Problemlösungsfähigkeiten von Kindern durch ansprechende LEGO-Erfahrungen entwickeln möchten.
themeDescriptions.Building Event: Feiere spezielle LEGO® Bauevents! Diese Sets gedenken Konventionen, Geschäftseröffnungen, Bauwettbewerben und Community-Treffen. Oft limitiert und exklusiv, markieren Building Event Sets denkwürdige Anlässe in der Geschichte der LEGO-Community. Von Konventions-Exklusivitäten bis zu Jubiläumsbauten fangen diese Sets den Geist von LEGO-Community-Events ein. Perfekt für Event-Teilnehmer, Sammler exklusiver Releases und Fans, die LEGO-Community-Erinnerungen schätzen.
themeDescriptions.Building Set with People: Klassische LEGO®-Sets mit Menschen und Alltagsleben! Diese Vintage-Kategorie aus LEGOs frühen Jahrzehnten umfasste einfache Gebäude und Figuren, die Gemeinschaftsleben darstellten. Bevor spezialisierte Themen entstanden, lehrten diese Sets Bau-Grundlagen durch nachvollziehbare Szenen. Historische Schätze aus LEGOs formativen Jahren zeigen diese Sets die Ursprünge des Minifiguren-Spiels und Community-Baus. Perfekt für Vintage-LEGO-Sammler, Historiker des Spielzeugdesigns und nostalgische Baumeister, die sich an LEGOs einfachere Ära erinnern.
themeDescriptions.Bulk Bricks: Reine Baufreiheit mit LEGO® Bulk Bricks! Diese Sets enthalten Hunderte oder Tausende von Grundbausteinen in verschiedenen Farben ohne Anleitung oder spezifische Modelle. Bulk Bricks liefert die Rohmaterialien für unbegrenzte Kreativität, perfekt für freies Bauen, Klassenzimmerzubehör oder Erweiterung bestehender Sammlungen. Von Grundplatten bis zu gemischten Steinsortementen betonen diese Sets die Kern-LEGO-Philosophie: Fantasie erschafft das Modell. Perfekt für Pädagogen, Eltern, die Spielbereiche ausstatten, und Baumeister, die ohne Einschränkungen kreieren möchten.
themeDescriptions.Cars: Starte deine Motoren mit LEGO® Cars™ Minifiguren! Basierend auf Pixars animierten Filmen Cars, Cars 2 und Cars 3, sammle Lightning McQueen, Hook, Sally, Doc Hudson und die gesamte Radiator Springs Crew. Während hauptsächlich aus Steinen gebaute Automodelle, enthalten einige Sets humanoide Boxencrew und Rennoffizielle Minifiguren. Diese Figuren ergänzen die Rennaktion und erwecken die Piston Cup Aufregung zum Leben. Von internationaler Spionage in Cars 2 bis zu Rennen der nächsten Generation in Cars 3, kreiere Filmmomente und Rennabenteuer. Perfekt für junge Pixar-Fans, die Rennen, Freundschaft und die herzerwärmende Geschichte eines Rennautos lieben, das lernt, was wirklich zählt.
themeDescriptions.Castle: Verteidige das Königreich mit LEGO® Castle Minifiguren! Von den klassischen Gelbes Schloss Rittern von 1978 bis zu den aufwendigen Fraktionen moderner Castle-Themen kämpfen diese mittelalterlichen Krieger seit über vier Jahrzehnten um Ehre und Ruhm. Sammle tapfere Ritter in glänzender Rüstung, mysteriöse Forestmen, furchteinflößende Black Falcons, edle Lion Knights und böse Dark Knights. Bekämpfe Skelettarmeen, Trolle und Drachen in epischen mittelalterlichen Schlachten. Unsere Castle-Sammlung umfasst Black Knights, Crusaders, Royal Knights, Dragon Masters und viele weitere Fraktionen, jede mit einzigartigen Farben, Wappen und Kampfstrategien. Diese zeitlosen Minifiguren fangen das Abenteuer, die Ritterlichkeit und die Fantasie ein, die mittelalterliche Geschichten unvergesslich machen.
themeDescriptions.Cities of Wonders: Erkunde architektonische Wunderwerke mit LEGO® Cities of Wonders! Obwohl ein limitiertes Thema, zeigten diese Sets berühmte Wahrzeichen und beeindruckende architektonische Errungenschaften aus der ganzen Welt. Cities of Wonders Sets kombinierten Bauherausforderungen mit kultureller Wertschätzung und feierten menschliche architektonische Leistungen durch aus Steinen gebaute Modelle. Perfekt für Reisebegeisterte, Architektur-Fans und Baumeister, die weltberühmte Strukturen nachbauen möchten.
themeDescriptions.City: Erlebe alltägliche Abenteuer mit LEGO® City Minifiguren! Von mutigen Feuerwehrleuten und Polizisten bis zu Astronauten und Bauarbeitern fängt LEGO City die Aufregung echter Jobs und Abenteuer ein. Sammle Küstenwache-Rettungsteams, Notfallhelfer, Pizzalieferanten und alle dazwischen. Unsere City-Sammlung zeigt Minifiguren, die diverse Karrieren und Lebensstile repräsentieren, von geschäftigen Stadtarbeitern bis zu Bergrettungsteams und Tiefsee-Forschern. Mit über vier Jahrzehnten ikonischer Designs ermöglichen LEGO City Minifiguren Baumeistern aller Altersgruppen, ihre eigene moderne Metropole zu erschaffen. Ob du Feuer löschst, Verbrechen aufklärst oder die Arktis erkundest, diese Minifiguren bringen die Aufregung des Stadtlebens und Abenteuers in deine Sammlung.
themeDescriptions.Classic: Entdecke reines Bauen neu mit LEGO® Classic! Dieses Thema feiert LEGO in seiner Essenz: bunte Steine, unbegrenzte Möglichkeiten und kreative Freiheit. Classic-Sets bieten vielseitige Teile in Regenbogen-Sortimenten und ermutigen Baumeister, alles zu erschaffen, was sie sich vorstellen. Von kleinen Starter-Sets bis zu massiven Steinboxen liefert Classic das grundlegende LEGO-Erlebnis ohne vorgeschriebene Themen. Mit einfachen Inspirationsheften und Betonung auf freiem Bauen lehren Classic-Sets Baufähigkeiten und feiern gleichzeitig Kreativität. Perfekt für Kinder, die bauen lernen, Familien, die vielseitige Teile wollen, und jeden, der glaubt, dass das beste LEGO-Set das ist, was du dir selbst vorstellst.
themeDescriptions.Clikits: Drücke dich aus mit LEGO® Clikits™ Minifiguren! Dieses kurzlebige Thema von 2003-2006 richtete sich an Mädchen mit Schmuck, Accessoires und Dekorationsgegenständen, die angepasst und zusammengesetzt werden konnten. Obwohl keine traditionellen Minifiguren, enthielten Clikits kleine Charakterfiguren und Mode-Accessoires, die zusammenklickten. Erstelle Armbänder, Bilderrahmen, Raumdekorationen und persönliche Accessoires mit bunten, zusammensteckbaren Teilen. Clikits repräsentierte LEGOs Experimentieren mit Mode- und Schmuck-Konstruktionssystemen. Obwohl eingestellt, war das Thema Pionier für Personalisierung und Selbstausdruck in LEGO-Produkten. Diese sammelwürdigen Accessoires boten eine andere Art des Bauens, die sich auf tragbare Kunst und Raumanpassung konzentrierte. Perfekt für nostalgische Fans, die sich erinnern, einzigartigen Schmuck zu kreieren und zu entdecken, dass LEGO modisch, persönlich und kreativ ausdrucksstark jenseits traditionellen Bauens sein konnte.
themeDescriptions.Collectible Minifigures: Entdecke einzigartige Charaktere mit LEGO® Collectible Minifigures! Seit 2010 haben diese Mystery-Bag-Serien skurrile, kreative und überraschende Charaktere geliefert, die du nirgendwo anders findest. Von Astronauten und Rittern bis zu Hot-Dog-Verkäufern und Einhorn-Typen bringt jede Serie 12-16 einzigartige Minifiguren mit exklusiven Accessoires und Designs. Sammle Fan-Favoriten-Themen wie Marvel, DC, Disney, The LEGO Movie, Harry Potter und The Simpsons oder erkunde Originalcharaktere, die Fantasie wecken. Mit über 30 Serien und mehr als 500 veröffentlichten einzigartigen Figuren feiert die Collectible Minifigures Linie Kreativität, Humor und endlose Möglichkeiten. Perfekt für Sammler, die nach seltenen Figuren jagen, oder Baumeister, die einzigartige Charaktere zu ihrer LEGO-Welt hinzufügen möchten.
themeDescriptions.Collectibles: Entdecke exklusive LEGO® Collectibles! Diese Kategorie umfasst Sonderveröffentlichungen, Jubiläumssets, Werbeartikel und limitierte Editionen, die hauptsächlich zum Sammeln und nicht zum Spielen konzipiert sind. Von Gedenk-Minifiguren bis zu speziellen Verpackungsvarianten feiern Collectibles die LEGO-Geschichte und -Kultur. Diese Sets steigen oft im Wert und werden zu geschätzten Sammlerstücken. Perfekt für ernsthafte Sammler, LEGO-Historiker und Fans, die seltene und exklusive Artikel suchen.
themeDescriptions.Creator: Entfessle unbegrenzte Kreativität mit LEGO® Creator Minifiguren! Dieses vielfältige Thema ermutigt Baumeister, alles zu erschaffen, was sie sich vorstellen können, von Gebäuden und Fahrzeugen bis zu Kreaturen und Fantasy-Welten. Creator Minifiguren spiegeln diese Vielseitigkeit wider und umfassen Piloten, Abenteurer, Surfer, Rennfahrer und alltägliche Menschen. Mit 3-in-1-Sets, die mehrere Bauoptionen bieten, können diese Figuren einen Moment Astronauten und im nächsten Dschungelforscher sein. Die Creator-Linie feiert Fantasie ohne Grenzen und gibt Baumeistern die Freiheit, jede Geschichte zu erzählen. Perfekt für Baumeister, die Flexibilität lieben und Minifiguren wollen, die zu jedem Abenteuer passen, das sie sich erträumen können.
themeDescriptions.Crocs: Personalisiere deine Crocs mit LEGO® Crocs-Kollaborationssets! Diese einzigartigen Accessoires bieten LEGO-Stein-themierte Jibbitz-Anhänger, die an Crocs-Schuhen befestigt werden. Diese Sets kombinieren zwei ikonische Marken und ermöglichen es dir, Schuhe mit bunten Steindesigns anzupassen. Obwohl limitiert, zeigte diese Zusammenarbeit LEGOs Expansion über traditionelles Bauen hinaus in Mode-Accessoires. Perfekt für Crocs-Enthusiasten, LEGO-Fans, die Markenartikel wollen, und diejenigen, die einzigartige Mode-Kooperationen lieben.
themeDescriptions.DC Super Hero Girls: Mädchenpower rettet den Tag mit LEGO® DC Super Hero Girls™ Minifiguren! Basierend auf der Animationsserie, sammle Teenager-Versionen von Wonder Woman, Supergirl, Batgirl, Bumblebee, Poison Ivy und Harley Quinn, während sie High School Leben mit Superhelden-Training balancieren. Diese Mini-Puppen-Figuren zeigen bunte Kostüme, einzigartige Frisuren und Superhelden-Accessoires. Von Superhero High School bis zu Bösewicht-Kämpfen feiern diese Sets Freundschaft, Empowerment und das Finden deines inneren Helden. DC Super Hero Girls reimaginiert klassische DC-Charaktere für ein jüngeres Publikum und betont Teamwork und Selbstvertrauen. Mit Fahrzeugen, Hauptquartieren und Schulkulissen, kreiere Abenteuer aus dem animierten Universum. Perfekt für junge Fans, die Superhelden, starke weibliche Charaktere und Geschichten über Freundschaft, Mut und du selbst sein lieben.
themeDescriptions.DREAMZzz: Träume größer mit LEGO® DREAMZzz™ Minifiguren! Dieses fantasievolle Thema erweckt die Traumwelt zum Leben, wo alles möglich ist. Folge Mateo, Izzie, Cooper, Logan und Zoey, während sie das Traumreich betreten und sich dem Albtraum-König und seinen dunklen Kräften stellen. Diese Minifiguren zeigen einzigartige Designs, die sich zwischen realen und Traumwelt-Versionen verwandeln und kreatives Geschichtenerzählen fördern. Baue fantastische Kreaturen, unmögliche Fahrzeuge und surreale Umgebungen, die nur durch Fantasie begrenzt sind. Mit geschichtsgetriebenem Bauen und mehreren Bauoptionen feiert DREAMZzz Kreativität und die Kraft der Träume. Perfekt für junge Baumeister, die Fantasy, Freundschaft und außerhalb der Box denken lieben.
themeDescriptions.DUPLO: Beginne früh mit dem Bauen mit LEGO® DUPLO® Figuren! Entwickelt für Kleinkinder und Vorschulkinder im Alter von 1,5-5 Jahren, bietet DUPLO größere Steine und Figuren, die für kleine Hände sicher sind und Erstickungsgefahren verhindern. Diese massiven, bunten Figuren führen sehr junge Kinder in Konstruktionsspiel ein und zeigen einfache Charaktere, Tiere und Gemeinschaftshelfer. Von Bauernhoftieren bis zu Feuerwehrleuten repräsentieren DUPLO-Figuren die erste Einführung eines Kindes ins LEGO-Universum. Mit abgerundeten Kanten und robuster Konstruktion hält DUPLO begeistertem Kleinkindspiel stand. Diese Figuren begleiten Sets, die grundlegende Konzepte wie Farben, Zahlen und tägliche Routinen lehren. DUPLO baut Feinmotorik, Kreativität und Fantasie von früh an auf. Perfekt für Babys, Kleinkinder und Vorschulkinder, die ihre lebenslange Reise mit LEGO-Bauen und kreativem Spiel beginnen.
themeDescriptions.Designer Sets: Erlebe fortgeschrittenes Bauen mit LEGO® Designer Sets! Diese Premium-Linie zeigte komplexe Modelle mit raffinierten Techniken für erfahrene Baumeister. Designer Sets erweiterten Grenzen mit architektonischen Modellen, mechanischen Funktionen und innovativen Baumethoden. Diese Sets repräsentieren LEGO auf höchstem Anspruchsniveau und erfordern Geduld und Geschick, während sie beeindruckende Ausstellungsmodelle liefern. Perfekt für Meisterbaumeister, erwachsene Enthusiasten, die Herausforderungen suchen, und Sammler von Premium-LEGO-Erlebnissen.
themeDescriptions.Despicable Me and Minions: Banana! LEGO® Despicable Me and Minions™ Figuren bringen Illuminations urkomische Charaktere in Steinform! Sammle Gru, seine bezaubernden Töchter Margo, Edith und Agnes, plus die liebenswerten Minions wie Kevin, Stuart und Bob. Diese Figuren fangen den Humor und das Herz der Despicable Me Franchise mit markanten Designs und Accessoires ein. Von Grus Labor bis zu den chaotischen Streichen der Minions, kreiere Filmmomente und erschaffe neue Abenteuer. Die Kauderwelsch-Sprache und das alberne Verhalten der Minions übersetzen sich perfekt in kreatives LEGO-Spiel. Mit Fahrzeugen, Waffen und vielen Bananen liefern diese Sets familienfreundliche Komödie und Action. Perfekt für Fans der Filme, die die ansteckende Energie der Minions lieben, Grus Transformation vom Bösewicht zum Vater und herzerwärmende Geschichten über unkonventionelle Familien.
themeDescriptions.Dimensions: Durchbrich die Grenzen zwischen Welten mit LEGO® Dimensions Minifiguren! Dieses bahnbrechende Toys-to-Life-Videospiel brachte Charaktere aus Popkultur-Universen zusammen. Sammle Batman, Gandalf, Wyldstyle, Sonic the Hedgehog, Homer Simpson, Scooby-Doo und Dutzende andere ikonische Charaktere - alle treffen sich in einem Spiel. Jede Minifigur kam mit einzigartigen Fähigkeiten und Fahrzeugen, die zwischen digitalem und physischem Spiel transportierten. Obwohl das Spiel 2017 endete, bleiben diese Crossover-Minifiguren beliebt dafür, Franchises zusammenzubringen, die sich normalerweise nie treffen würden. Ein einzigartiger Moment in der LEGO-Geschichte, wo alles möglich war und jeder Charakter Freunde sein konnte.
themeDescriptions.Dino: Jage prähistorische Kreaturen mit LEGO® Dino™ Minifiguren! Dieses Thema von 2012 zeigte ein Team moderner Forscher und Wissenschaftler, die Dinosaurier mit fortschrittlicher Technologie verfolgten. Sammle robuste Abenteurer mit Tracking-Ausrüstung, Betäubungspistolen und Geländefahrzeugen, während sie entkommene Dinosaurier studieren und eindämmen. Diese Minifiguren trugen detaillierte Erkundungsausrüstung in Orange- und Dunkelgrün-Farbschema. Von T-Rex bis Triceratops-Begegnungen kombinierte Dino Paläontologie mit Action-Abenteuer. Obwohl ein Ein-Jahres-Thema, lieferte Dino spannende Dinosaurier-Action mit zeitgenössischen Charakteren. Perfekt für Dinosaurier-Fans, die moderne Expeditionen, wissenschaftliche Erkundung und den Nervenkitzel lieben, lebenden prähistorischen Raubtieren zu begegnen.
themeDescriptions.Dino 2010: Jage Dinosaurier mit LEGO® Dino 2010! Die europäische Version von Dino Attack zeigte moderne Forscher, die prähistorische Kreaturen mit fortschrittlicher Technologie verfolgten. Sets enthielten Geländefahrzeuge, Forschungsstationen und Begegnungen mit T-Rex, Triceratops und anderen Dinosauriern. Mit lindgrün und orange Farbschema lieferte Dino 2010 actiongeladene Dinosaurier-Abenteuer. Perfekt für Dinosaurier-Fans, Fahrzeugbauer und Sammler von LEGOs Dinosaurier-thematischer Geschichte.
themeDescriptions.Dino Attack: Mutanten-Dinosaurier bedrohen die Menschheit mit LEGO® Dino Attack™ Minifiguren! Dieses apokalyptische Thema von 2005 (Dino 2010 in Europa) zeigte Militärteams, die mutierte Reptilien mit futuristischen Waffen und Fahrzeugen bekämpften. Sammle Soldaten in markanten schwarz, orange und lindgrün Uniformen mit fortschrittlicher Bewaffnung. Diese Minifiguren kämpften gegen genetisch veränderte Dinosaurier in post-apokalyptischen Kulissen. Dunkler und militaristischer als typische LEGO-Themen, lieferte Dino Attack intensive Action und Sci-Fi-Horror-Elemente. Obwohl kontrovers wegen seines aggressiven Tons, bleibt es unvergesslich für Fans von militärischer Sci-Fi und Dinosaurier-Action. Perfekt für Sammler, die einzigartige, dunklere LEGO-Themen mit Weltuntergangs-Einsätzen schätzen.
themeDescriptions.Dinosaurs: Brülle in prähistorische Zeiten mit LEGO® Dinosaurs! Dieses Vintage-Thema zeigte baubare Dinosaurier-Modelle, bevor Minifiguren zum Standard wurden. Von T-Rex bis Brontosaurus ermöglichten diese Sets Baumeistern, beeindruckende Reptilien für Ausstellung und Spiel zu konstruieren. Diese Sets repräsentieren LEGOs frühe Erkundung prähistorischer Themen und fangen Nostalgie für einfachere Bauzeiten ein. Perfekt für Dinosaurier-Enthusiasten, Vintage-LEGO-Sammler und Paläontologie-Fans.
themeDescriptions.Discovery: Erkunde die reale Welt mit LEGO® Discovery™ Minifiguren! Dieses Bildungsthema aus den späten 1990er und frühen 2000ern konzentrierte sich auf reale Themen wie Dinosaurier, Weltraumforschung und Archäologie. Sets zeigten Paläontologen, Astronauten und Wissenschaftler neben baubaren Bildungsmodellen. Discovery kombinierte LEGO-Bauen mit faktischem Lernen, einschließlich Informationsbroschüren über die Themen. Diese Minifiguren repräsentierten Fachleute in wissenschaftlichen Bereichen und inspirierten Interesse an realen Karrieren. Vom Ausgraben von Dinosaurierknochen bis zum Verstehen von Weltraummissionen machte Discovery Lernen greifbar und Spaß. Obwohl kurz, demonstrierte das Thema LEGOs Engagement für Bildungswert über Unterhaltung hinaus. Perfekt für neugierige Kinder, die sich für Wissenschaft, Geschichte und Erkundung interessieren und Spiel mit Wissen über unsere Welt und das Universum verbinden.
themeDescriptions.Disney: Betritt die magische Welt von Disney™ mit LEGO® Disney Minifiguren! Sammle geliebte Prinzessinnen wie Elsa, Anna, Ariel, Belle und Cinderella, zusammen mit klassischen Charakteren wie Mickey Mouse, Minnie Mouse, Donald Duck und Goofy. Unsere Disney-Sammlung umspannt Generationen des Geschichtenerzählens, von zeitlosen Klassikern bis zu modernen Favoriten wie Moana, Raya und Charakteren aus Encanto. Baue Märchenschlösser mit Frozen-Charakteren, segle die Meere mit Moana oder kreiere magische Momente mit Disney-Prinzessinnen. Diese Minifiguren fangen den Charme, die Magie und das Wunder ein, das Disney Publikum weltweit bringt. Perfekt für junge Baumeister und Disney-Fans, die ihre eigenen Happy Ends erschaffen möchten.
themeDescriptions.Dots: Drücke dich aus mit LEGO® Dots! Dieses innovative Thema ermöglicht es dir, Schmuck, Raumdekoration und Accessoires mit bunten Fliesendesigns anzupassen. Erstelle Armbänder, Bilderrahmen, Schreibtischorganisatoren und mehr, dann personalisiere sie mit lebendigen Musterfliesen. Dots betont Selbstausdruck, Kreativität und Mode durch Bauen. Mit endlosen Anpassungsoptionen und regelmäßigen saisonalen Veröffentlichungen verwandelt Dots LEGO in tragbaren und ausstellbaren persönlichen Stil. Perfekt für Tweens, die Identität erkunden, Bastler, die Anpassung lieben, und jeden, der kreativen Selbstausdruck durch Design sucht.
themeDescriptions.Dune: Die Gewürze müssen fließen mit LEGO® Dune™ Minifiguren! Basierend auf Frank Herberts legendärem Science-Fiction-Epos und Denis Villeneuves filmischer Adaption, sammle Charaktere vom Wüstenplaneten Arrakis. Baue Paul Atreides, Lady Jessica, Duke Leto, Chani, Stilgar und den rücksichtslosen Baron Harkonnen. Diese Minifiguren fangen die komplizierten Kostüme, Stillsuits und Wüstenästhetik dieses komplexen Universums ein. Von Ornithoptern bis zu Sandwurm-Begegnungen, kreiere die politischen Intrigen und Wüstenkriege, die Dune definieren. Mit detailliertem Druck und Accessoires, die Fremen-Kultur und edle Häuser repräsentieren, ehren diese Figuren eines der einflussreichsten Werke der Science-Fiction. Perfekt für Fans epischer Science-Fiction, politischem Drama, Umweltthemen und der weitreichenden Saga, die Generationen von Sci-Fi-Storytelling inspirierte.
themeDescriptions.Editions: Entdecke exklusive Schätze mit LEGO® Editions Minifiguren! Diese Kategorie umfasst Sonderveröffentlichungen, limitierte Editionen und exklusive Werbefiguren, die nicht über den regulären Einzelhandel erhältlich sind. Von Laden-Neueröffnungen bis zu Konventions-Exklusivitäten und Mitarbeitergeschenken gehören Editions Minifiguren zu den seltensten im LEGO-Sammeln. Diese Figuren zeigen oft einzigartigen Druck, Farben oder Charaktere, die anderswo nicht verfügbar sind. Einige feiern LEGO-Meilensteine, Jubiläen oder Partnerschaften mit speziellen Organisationen. Editions-Figuren erzielen Premiumpreise auf dem Sekundärmarkt aufgrund ihrer Knappheit. Von verchromten Werbefiguren bis zu eventspezifischen Charakteren erzählt jede eine Geschichte über LEGOs Geschichte und besondere Anlässe. Perfekt für ernsthafte Sammler, die seltene Figuren jagen, Vollständigkeitssammler, die schwer fassbare Stücke suchen, und Fans, die die Geschichte hinter exklusiven LEGO-Veröffentlichungen lieben.
themeDescriptions.Education: Lerne durch Bauen mit LEGO® Education Minifiguren! Speziell für Klassenzimmer und Bildungsumgebungen konzipiert, begleiten diese Figuren lehrplanbasierte Lernsets. Von Gemeinschaftshelfern, die soziale Rollen lehren, bis zu STEM-fokussierten Charakteren, die Wissenschaft und Ingenieurwesen erkunden, unterstützen Education Minifiguren strukturierte Lernziele. Diese Sets enthalten vielfältige Figuren, die verschiedene Kulturen, Berufe und Fähigkeiten repräsentieren und inklusive Bildung fördern. Lehrer verwenden diese Minifiguren, um Geschichtenerzählen, sozial-emotionales Lernen, mathematische Konzepte und Ingenieursprinzipien zu lehren. Im Gegensatz zu Unterhaltungsthemen priorisieren Education-Figuren pädagogischen Wert und ausgerichtete Lehrplanstandards. Mit Lehrerhandbüchern und Unterrichtsplänen verwandeln diese Sets Spiel in messbare Lernergebnisse. Perfekt für Pädagogen, die praktisches Lernen ins Klassenzimmer bringen, und Eltern, die Bildungsspielzeug schätzen, das kritisches Denken durch kreative Konstruktion entwickelt.
themeDescriptions.Educational & Dacta: Baue Wissen mit LEGO® Educational & Dacta Minifiguren! Dacta (jetzt LEGO Education) lieferte seit den 1970ern Bildungs-LEGO-Produkte an Schulen und Institutionen. Diese spezialisierten Sets enthielten vielfältige Minifiguren, die Gemeinschaftsmitglieder, Arbeiter, Familien und Kinder aus verschiedenen Hintergründen repräsentierten. Educational & Dacta Figuren lehren soziale Konzepte, kulturelles Bewusstsein und Gemeinschaftsrollen durch spielbasiertes Lernen. Von Krankenhausmitarbeitern bis zu öffentlichen Dienstleistern helfen diese Figuren Kindern, ihre Welt zu verstehen. Sets betonten realistische Szenarien über Fantasy und unterstützten Lehrplanziele. Mit Fokus auf Vielfalt und Repräsentation war Dacta Pionier für inklusives Spielzeug vor Jahrzehnten. Obwohl der Dacta-Name zu LEGO Education entwickelte, bleiben diese Vintage-Bildungsfiguren von Sammlern und Pädagogen geschätzt. Perfekt für diejenigen, die LEGOs Bildungserbe und Engagement für Lernen durch Spiel schätzen.
themeDescriptions.Elves: Discover magic in Elvendale with LEGO® Elves™ minifigures! This fantasy theme (2015-2018) followed Emily Jones as she entered the magical elf world. Collect elemental elves like Azari (fire), Naida (water), Farran (earth), and Aira (air), plus the mysterious Rosalyn Nightshade and the evil Goblin King. These mini-doll figures featured colorful fantasy designs, pointed ears, and magical accessories. Build treehouses, castles, and workshops in a vibrant fantasy realm. With dragons, pegasi, and enchanted forests, Elves delivered magical adventures and friendship themes. Perfect for fans of fantasy, magic, elemental powers, and colorful worlds filled with wonder and imagination.
themeDescriptions.Exo-Force: Pilot giant mechs with LEGO® Exo-Force™ minifigures! This anime-inspired theme (2006-2008) featured young pilots defending Sentai Mountain from evil robots. Collect heroes like Hikaru, Takeshi, Ryo, and Ha-Ya-To alongside villain Meca One and robot forces. These minifigures featured manga-style designs with distinctive hair and Japanese-influenced aesthetics. From battling machines to hovering fortresses, Exo-Force combined mecha anime with LEGO building. Each figure piloted customizable battle machines in a continuing storyline. Though short-lived, Exo-Force remains beloved by fans of anime, robots, and the unique fusion of LEGO with Japanese pop culture.
themeDescriptions.Explore: Discover adventure with LEGO® Explore! This educational line for young children bridges DUPLO and System building with age-appropriate themes. Explore sets taught logical thinking, problem-solving, and narrative play through construction. Though brief, Explore represented LEGO's commitment to developmentally appropriate building experiences. Perfect for preschoolers transitioning from DUPLO and parents seeking educational early building experiences.
themeDescriptions.Explorer: Venture into the unknown with LEGO® Explorer sets! This adventure-focused category featured expeditions, discoveries, and journey-themed builds. From jungle exploration to desert adventures, Explorer sets celebrated human curiosity and discovery. Perfect for adventurous builders, travel enthusiasts, and children who dream of exploration.
themeDescriptions.FIRST LEGO League: Compete and innovate with FIRST LEGO® League minifigures! This global robotics competition challenges students to build robots using LEGO components while researching real-world problems. Limited minifigures related to each season's challenge theme accompany competition materials. From ocean exploration to space missions, each year's figures reflect that season's research topic. FIRST LEGO League combines LEGO building with programming, engineering, and teamwork. These exclusive figures represent the competition's emphasis on innovation and problem-solving. Participants receive recognition through trophies, patches, and sometimes special minifigures. This program inspires the next generation of engineers and scientists through hands-on STEM challenges. Perfect for students passionate about robotics, educators supporting STEM education, and families encouraging technical skills through competitive building.
themeDescriptions.FORMA: Create kinetic art with LEGO® FORMA! This innovative adult line featured organic, flowing designs with customizable skins. Build mechanical fish that undulate gracefully, combining engineering with artistic expression. FORMA represented LEGO's experimental approach to adult building, blending function with aesthetics. Though discontinued, FORMA showcased LEGO's willingness to explore new creative territories. Perfect for adult builders seeking unique experiences, kinetic art enthusiasts, and collectors of experimental LEGO lines.
themeDescriptions.Fabuland: Enter a gentle animal world with LEGO® Fabuland™ minifigures! This 1979-1989 theme featured anthropomorphic animal characters for young children. Collect friendly characters like Max Mouse, Edward Elephant, Bonnie Bunny, and dozens more animals living in a peaceful community. These larger figures with single-piece bodies predated modern minifigures, designed for small hands. Fabuland told simple stories about everyday life, work, and friendship in a colorful animal town. Though discontinued, Fabuland remains nostalgic for fans who grew up with these charming characters. Perfect for vintage LEGO collectors and parents who remember the gentle, character-driven storytelling of this classic early theme.
themeDescriptions.Factory: Design your own sets with LEGO® Factory! This revolutionary service let fans create custom models using LEGO Digital Designer software, then order the exact pieces to build their designs. Factory democratized LEGO design, giving builders tools previously reserved for LEGO designers. Though the service ended, Factory inspired LEGO Ideas and community design programs. Perfect for nostalgic remembrance of LEGO's digital innovation and the origins of community-designed sets.
themeDescriptions.Fortnite: Drop into the Battle Royale with LEGO® Fortnite™ minifigures! Based on the global gaming phenomenon, collect iconic skins and characters from Fortnite's ever-evolving world. From default skins to legendary outfits, these minifigures capture the game's distinctive art style and personality. Build Battle Bus encounters, construct defense structures, and recreate Victory Royales with detailed figures featuring back bling, pickaxes, and weapons. Whether you're a pro player or casual fan, these minifigures bring Fortnite's colorful chaos from screen to brick. Perfect for gamers who love building, battling, and expressing their unique style through cosmetic customization.
themeDescriptions.FreeStyle: Express unlimited creativity with LEGO® FreeStyle minifigures! This theme from the 1990s and early 2000s emphasized open-ended building without specific models or instructions. FreeStyle sets contained basic bricks, wheels, windows, and simple minifigures for whatever builders could imagine. These generic figures could become anyone - astronauts, drivers, adventurers, or everyday people. FreeStyle represented pure LEGO philosophy: providing pieces and letting creativity determine the outcome. With bright colors and versatile elements, these sets encouraged experimentation. Though simple compared to modern minifigures, FreeStyle figures sparked countless stories and creations. This theme trusted builders to invent their own adventures without prescribed narratives. Perfect for nostalgic builders who remember when LEGO meant a bucket of bricks and infinite possibilities limited only by imagination.
themeDescriptions.Friends: Welcome to Heartlake City with LEGO® Friends minifigures! Follow the adventures of Andrea, Emma, Mia, Olivia, and Stephanie as they navigate friendship, creativity, and fun in their vibrant community. From beach days and camping trips to music performances and pet rescues, these mini-dolls capture every moment of friendship and adventure. Our Friends collection has evolved over the years, introducing new characters and celebrating diversity, ensuring every builder can see themselves in Heartlake City. Whether you're building the perfect treehouse, running a café, or caring for animals at the rescue center, LEGO Friends minifigures bring stories of kindness, creativity, and friendship to life.
themeDescriptions.Friends TV Series: Could these BE any more awesome? LEGO® Friends TV Series minifigures bring the beloved sitcom to brick form! Collect all six friends - Ross, Rachel, Monica, Chandler, Joey, and Phoebe - with iconic outfits and accessories from the show. Build Central Perk with the orange couch where countless conversations happened, or recreate Monica and Rachel's apartment. These minifigures capture the distinctive looks and personalities that made Friends a cultural phenomenon. From Ross's dinosaur passion to Joey's pizza love, detailed accessories reference classic episodes. With Central Perk's coffee cups and the apartment's details, relive favorite moments from all ten seasons. Perfect for fans who grew up watching Friends, nostalgia lovers, and anyone who understands these references without explanation.
themeDescriptions.Fusion: Merge physical and digital with LEGO® Fusion minifigures! This innovative 2014-2015 theme combined physical LEGO building with mobile gaming. Build creations on special baseplates, scan them with a smartphone, and watch them appear in companion apps. Fusion included Town Master (city building), Battle Towers (defense game), Resort Designer (hotel management), and Create & Race (vehicle racing). Minifigures interacted between physical and digital worlds, representing LEGO's experimentation with connected play. Though short-lived, Fusion pioneered augmented reality before it became mainstream. These figures represented characters that existed simultaneously as physical toys and digital game elements. Perfect for collectors of discontinued themes who appreciate LEGO's innovation in blending traditional building with modern gaming technology.
themeDescriptions.Gabby's Dollhouse: Come inside with LEGO® Gabby's Dollhouse™! Based on the DreamWorks animated series, shrink down to kitty size with Gabby and her cat friends. Collect Gabby, Pandy Paws, Cakey Cat, MerCat, DJ Catnip, and all the adorable characters from the show's colorful rooms. These DUPLO and standard LEGO figures bring preschool creativity and kindness to life. Build themed rooms, solve problems with kindness, and celebrate imagination. Perfect for young builders who love the show's positive messages, cute cats, and the magic of creative play in a dollhouse world where anything is possible.
themeDescriptions.Galidor: Battle in the Outer Dimension with LEGO® Galidor! Based on the 2002 television series, Galidor featured buildable action figures with interchangeable body parts. This experimental theme blended building with action figure play, allowing characters to swap limbs and abilities. Though short-lived, Galidor represented LEGO's bold experimentation beyond traditional building. Perfect for collectors of discontinued themes, fans of early 2000s LEGO innovation, and those who remember this unique attempt at action figure building.
themeDescriptions.Games: Roll the dice with LEGO® Games minifigures! This unique theme (2009-2013) transformed LEGO into playable board games. Build your own game boards using LEGO bricks, then play with included rules and custom microfigures. These specialized miniature figures (smaller than standard minifigures) represented game tokens and characters. From Pirate Plank to Minotaurus, from racing games to strategy battles, LEGO Games delivered customizable gameplay. Players could modify rules and boards, making each game session unique. While microfigures differ from traditional minifigures, they introduced innovative character designs. Games represented LEGO expanding beyond building into interactive entertainment. Perfect for board game fans who love customization and anyone who appreciates LEGO's creative approach to traditional tabletop gaming.
themeDescriptions.Ghostbusters: Who you gonna call? LEGO® Ghostbusters™ minifigures! Capture spooks and specters with Peter Venkman, Ray Stantz, Egon Spengler, and Winston Zeddemore. These highly detailed figures feature the iconic tan jumpsuits, proton packs, and ghost-catching equipment from the classic 1984 film and its sequels. Collect supporting characters like Janine Melnitz and face off against ghosts, including the unforgettable Stay Puft Marshmallow Man. From the Ecto-1 to the firehouse headquarters, recreate paranormal investigations and supernatural showdowns. Perfect for fans of the beloved comedy franchise who ain't afraid of no ghost and want to build the ultimate ghost-busting team.
themeDescriptions.Harry Potter: Step into the magical world of Harry Potter™ with LEGO® minifigures that bring Hogwarts™ to life. Collect Harry, Ron, and Hermione throughout their years at school, from first-year students to battle-ready wizards. Build your collection with iconic professors like Dumbledore, McGonagall, and Snape, or add dark wizards like Voldemort and the Death Eaters. Our Harry Potter minifigures feature beloved characters from all eight films, including fan favorites like Dobby, Hagrid, Luna Lovegood, and Neville Longbottom. From Quidditch players in their house robes to Triwizard Tournament champions, each minifigure captures the magic and detail that makes the wizarding world so enchanting. Perfect for fans of all ages who want to recreate their favorite scenes or create new magical adventures.
themeDescriptions.Hero Factory: Build a Hero with LEGO® Hero Factory™ minifigures! This constraction theme (2010-2014) succeeded BIONICLE with buildable action figures. Hero Factory featured robots assembled in a factory to protect the galaxy from villains. While primarily buildable figures, some sets included traditional minifigure-scale characters. Heroes like Stormer, Furno, Bulk, and Breez battled villains like Von Nebula and the Brains. Each hero specialized in different skills and equipment, upgradeable through the storyline. Hero Factory delivered sci-fi action with a factory production theme, emphasizing customization and combination builds. Though shorter-lived than BIONICLE, it developed a loyal following. Perfect for fans of buildable action figures, robot heroes, and the sci-fi universe where heroes are manufactured to protect civilization.
themeDescriptions.Hidden Side: Hunt ghosts in LEGO® Hidden Side™! This innovative theme combines physical building with augmented reality ghost hunting through a mobile app. Collect paranormal investigators Jack Davids and Parker L. Jackson as they explore the haunted town of Newbury. Battle ghosts, possessed objects, and supernatural forces while uncovering the mystery behind the Hidden Side. Though the theme ended in 2020, these unique minifigures feature glow-in-the-dark elements and reversible heads showing ghostly possession. Hidden Side pushed LEGO into new territory, blending physical and digital play in exciting ways. Perfect for ghost hunters and anyone who loves mysteries with a supernatural twist.
themeDescriptions.Hobby Sets: Explore specialized interests with LEGO® Hobby Sets! This vintage category included builds focused on specific hobbies, interests, and activities. From classic cars to aircraft, Hobby Sets let builders recreate their passions in LEGO form. Representing LEGO's early diversification, these sets targeted specific interests before modern specialized themes. Perfect for vintage collectors, hobby enthusiasts, and fans of LEGO's experimental early years.
themeDescriptions.Holiday & Event: Celebrate year-round with LEGO® Holiday & Event minifigures! These seasonal sets commemorate Christmas, Halloween, Easter, Thanksgiving, Lunar New Year, and other celebrations worldwide. Collect Santa Claus in countless variants, Easter Bunnies, witches, pumpkin-headed figures, and festive characters. From Christmas workshops to Halloween scenes, these themed minifigures bring seasonal joy to LEGO collections. Holiday sets often include exclusive minifigures unavailable elsewhere, making them highly collectible. Cultural celebrations receive representation, from Chinese New Year traditions to winter festivals. These figures help families build holiday traditions and seasonal decorations. With gift-giving themes and festive accessories, Holiday & Event minifigures spread joy throughout the calendar. Perfect for collectors who love seasonal displays and families building year-round traditions with LEGO.
themeDescriptions.Homemaker: Build everyday life with LEGO® Homemaker minifigures! This classic theme from the 1970s focused on domestic settings, kitchens, bedrooms, and household scenarios. Homemaker figures represented families in everyday situations, featuring detailed homes with furniture and appliances. These sets targeted girls with domestic play patterns, reflecting 1970s gender marketing approaches. From cooking dinner to arranging furniture, Homemaker emphasized realistic household activities. Though dated by modern standards, these sets pioneered detailed interior building and domestic storytelling. The theme evolved into more inclusive modern themes like City and Friends. Homemaker figures remain nostalgic for collectors who remember LEGO's earlier approach to everyday life scenarios. Perfect for vintage collectors and those appreciating LEGO history before themes became diverse and inclusive.
themeDescriptions.Horizon: Hunt mechanical beasts in a post-apocalyptic world with LEGO® Horizon™ minifigures! Based on PlayStation's acclaimed video game series, collect Aloy and other tribal hunters from Horizon Forbidden West and LEGO Horizon Adventures. These minifigures feature detailed tribal gear, weapons, and accessories from the games' unique blend of primitive culture and advanced technology. Face mechanical dinosaurs and uncover ancient secrets in a far-future Earth. With stunning visual designs and epic adventures, Horizon brings PlayStation gaming to LEGO building. Perfect for gamers who love exploration, robot dinosaurs, and post-apocalyptic worlds where nature and technology collide in spectacular fashion.
themeDescriptions.IKEA: Build Swedish design with LEGO® IKEA collaboration sets! These special releases combined IKEA's minimalist aesthetic with LEGO building. From storage solutions with buildable elements to furniture-inspired builds, the IKEA partnership explored home design through bricks. Perfect for design enthusiasts, IKEA fans, and collectors of brand collaboration sets.
themeDescriptions.Indiana Jones: Adventure awaits with LEGO® Indiana Jones™ minifigures! Recreate classic film moments with Professor Henry Jones Jr. in his iconic fedora, leather jacket, and whip. Collect Indy across multiple films - Raiders of the Lost Ark, Temple of Doom, Last Crusade, and Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Face villains like René Belloq, Major Toht, Mola Ram, and Irina Spalko. These minifigures capture the pulp adventure spirit with detailed printing and accessories. From the golden idol to the Holy Grail, seek ancient artifacts while dodging traps and enemies. Perfect for fans of classic adventure films, archaeology, and the archaeologist who belongs in a museum.
themeDescriptions.Inventor: Innovate and create with LEGO® Inventor! This educational line teaches engineering principles through motorized building. Construct vehicles, machines, and contraptions that move, then learn the science behind how they work. Inventor bridges play and education, making STEM concepts tangible through building. Perfect for young engineers, students learning mechanics, and parents seeking educational building experiences.
themeDescriptions.Island Xtreme Stunts: Extreme action awaits with LEGO® Island Xtreme Stunts minifigures! Based on the 2002 video game sequel to LEGO Island, this theme featured Pepper Roni and friends performing dangerous stunts for a movie production. Collect characters from LEGO Island including the Brickster, the skateboarding pizza delivery hero Pepper, and movie crew members. These sets combined action sports with movie-making themes, featuring ramps, vehicles, and stunt equipment. Island Xtreme Stunts represented LEGO's expansion into multimedia franchises connecting games with physical sets. Though brief, it delivered high-energy action and extreme sports excitement. Perfect for fans of the classic LEGO Island video games, nostalgic gamers, and collectors of LEGO's experimental multimedia themes from the early 2000s.
themeDescriptions.Juniors: Build confidence with LEGO® Juniors! Designed for children ages 4-7, Juniors bridges DUPLO and System building with simplified sets featuring Quick Start elements. These sets include large foundation pieces that let young builders complete models quickly, building confidence while teaching System building techniques. From superhero adventures to city scenes, Juniors delivers age-appropriate building success. Perfect for kindergarten builders transitioning to regular LEGO and parents seeking confidence-building construction experiences.
themeDescriptions.Jurassic World: Life finds a way with LEGO® Jurassic World™ minifigures! Collect fearless dinosaur trainers like Owen Grady and Claire Dearing as they navigate the dangerous world of prehistoric creatures. From park scientists to InGen personnel, our Jurassic World collection features characters from all six films spanning the Jurassic Park and Jurassic World franchises. While the dinosaurs steal the show, these brave minifigures are ready to study, rescue, or escape from these magnificent creatures. Whether you're recreating the classic Jurassic Park gates or building modern Jurassic World adventures, these detailed minifigures bring 65 million years of history to life. Perfect for dinosaur enthusiasts and action-adventure fans of all ages.
themeDescriptions.LEGENDS OF CHIMA: Enter the mystical animal kingdom with LEGO® LEGENDS OF CHIMA™ minifigures! In this fantastical world, anthropomorphic animals battle for control of the powerful CHI energy. Collect warriors from noble tribes like the Lions led by Laval, Crocodiles under Cragger, Eagles with Eris, Wolves with Worriz, Ravens, Gorillas, and Bears. Face sinister villains from the Ice Tribes and legendary creatures. Each minifigure features incredible detail with animal heads, armor, weapons, and tribal markings. With complex alliances, betrayals, and epic battles, Chima delivers rich storytelling and stunning character designs. Perfect for fans of fantasy, animals, and action-packed adventures in a unique LEGO universe.
themeDescriptions.LEGO Brand: Celebrate LEGO itself with LEGO® Brand minifigures! These meta sets and figures celebrate the LEGO company, its history, stores, and brand identity. From LEGO Store employee figures to brand ambassadors, LEGO Brand minifigures represent the company's self-referential products. Collect promotional store figures, anniversary celebration characters, and corporate mascots. These figures often appear in LEGO Store grand openings, brand events, and corporate materials. Some celebrate LEGO milestones like anniversaries or achievements. LEGO Brand figures acknowledge that LEGO itself has become a beloved icon worthy of celebration. From classic logo designs to modern branding, these figures tell LEGO's story. Perfect for ultimate fans who love LEGO not just as a toy but as a cultural institution and brand with rich history.
themeDescriptions.LEGO Ideas (CUUSOO): Fan creativity becomes reality with LEGO® Ideas minifigures! Formerly CUUSOO, this platform lets fans submit designs that the community votes on. Successful projects reaching 10,000 supporters are reviewed for production. Ideas sets span incredible diversity - from NASA Apollo Saturn V to The Big Bang Theory apartment, from Beatles Yellow Submarine to working typewriters. Minifigures reflect this range, featuring real people (scientists, musicians), fictional characters, and historical figures. Each Ideas set represents a fan's dream becoming official LEGO. With community-driven selection and limited production, these figures celebrate fan passion. Perfect for collectors who appreciate fan creativity, unique builds, and supporting fellow enthusiasts' visions becoming real LEGO products that anyone can build.
themeDescriptions.LEGO Originals: Celebrate LEGO culture with LEGO® Originals! This lifestyle brand extends LEGO beyond building into clothing, accessories, and collectibles celebrating LEGO heritage. From vintage-inspired merchandise to cultural collaborations, LEGO Originals makes LEGO identity wearable. Perfect for LEGO fans seeking branded lifestyle products and collectors who love LEGO culture beyond bricks.
themeDescriptions.LEGOLAND: Experience the parks at home with LEGO® LEGOLAND minifigures! These sets recreate rides, attractions, and experiences from LEGOLAND theme parks worldwide. Collect park visitors, ride operators, and mascots from LEGO's real-world destinations. From roller coasters to miniland displays, these sets bring theme park magic home. LEGOLAND figures often include exclusive variants sold only at park locations. With park maps, attractions, and iconic structures, these sets celebrate LEGO's physical presence worldwide. Some sets recreate specific park areas or attractions, letting fans relive vacation memories. Perfect for families who visited LEGOLAND parks, enthusiasts collecting park exclusives, and builders who want to recreate theme park excitement in brick form at home.
themeDescriptions.LEGOLAND Parks: Adventure awaits at LEGOLAND® Parks with exclusive minifigures available only at theme park locations! These special figures commemorate visits to LEGOLAND parks across the globe - from California to Florida, Windsor to Billund, Dubai to Japan. Park-exclusive minifigures feature unique designs, often incorporating park logos, landmarks, or regional themes. Collect mascots, ride operators, and special edition figures unavailable anywhere else. LEGOLAND Parks minifigures become travel souvenirs and prove you visited specific locations. With limited availability and regional exclusivity, they're highly sought by collectors. These figures celebrate the real-world places where LEGO imagination comes to life. Perfect for park visitors wanting mementos, collectors hunting rare exclusives, and fans of LEGO's theme park legacy spanning decades.
themeDescriptions.Lightyear: To infinity and beyond with LEGO® Lightyear™ minifigures! Based on the Pixar film exploring Buzz Lightyear's origin story, collect Space Ranger Buzz, his team, and the menacing Zurg. These minifigures feature sci-fi space suits, advanced technology, and futuristic designs. While inspired by Toy Story's Buzz, Lightyear tells the real story of the space hero. Build starships, explore alien planets, and battle robots in epic space adventures. Though a standalone Pixar film, these figures connect to the beloved Toy Story universe. Perfect for Pixar fans who want to explore the heroic origins of everyone's favorite Space Ranger.
themeDescriptions.MINDSTORMS: Program the future with LEGO® MINDSTORMS! This revolutionary robotics platform combines LEGO building with advanced programming, letting you construct and code sophisticated robots. From remote-controlled vehicles to autonomous problem-solvers, MINDSTORMS makes engineering and computer science tangible. With sensors, motors, and unlimited building possibilities, MINDSTORMS has educated millions in robotics since 1998. Perfect for students learning programming, educators teaching STEM, robotics competitors, and anyone fascinated by bringing LEGO creations to life through code.
themeDescriptions.MIXELS: Mix and combine with LEGO® MIXELS! This quirky theme featured small, colorful creatures from different tribes that could combine into larger 'Maxes' or even 'Murps'. Based on a Cartoon Network series, MIXELS delivered affordable, creative builds with personality. Each series introduced new tribes with unique characteristics and combination possibilities. Perfect for children who love combining builds, collectors of complete series, and budget-conscious builders seeking fun, creative sets.
themeDescriptions.Master Builder Academy: Learn advanced techniques with LEGO® Master Builder Academy minifigures! This subscription-based program (2011-2013) taught sophisticated building skills through monthly kits. Each level introduced professional building techniques used by official LEGO designers. Accompanying minifigures represented instructors and characters guiding builders through increasingly complex projects. Master Builder Academy emphasized education through structured curriculum, graduating students through different achievement levels. From architecture to mechanical engineering, these sets taught real skills. Though discontinued, Master Builder Academy represented premium educational LEGO content for serious builders. These figures came with designer secrets and insider building tips. Perfect for adult builders seeking mastery, LEGO enthusiasts wanting professional techniques, and collectors of educational LEGO history.
themeDescriptions.Minecraft: Build, craft, and explore the blocky world of Minecraft® with LEGO® minifigures! From Steve and Alex to zombies, creepers, and endermen, bring your favorite Minecraft characters into the real world. Collect villagers, piglins, skeletons, and all the mobs that make Minecraft adventures unforgettable. Our Minecraft minifigures feature the same cubic design as the game, perfectly capturing the iconic blocky aesthetic while adding LEGO building possibilities. Battle the Ender Dragon, explore the Nether, or build your dream base with these detailed character figures. Perfect for Minecraft players who want to bring their digital adventures into physical building experiences, combining two beloved worlds of creativity and imagination.
themeDescriptions.Minitalia: Discover Italian LEGO history with Minitalia! This vintage line was exclusive to the Italian market, featuring unique builds and packaging. Minitalia sets represent regional LEGO variations and the company's international market strategies. Perfect for international LEGO historians, Italian collectors, and fans of regional LEGO exclusives.
themeDescriptions.Model Team: Build realistic scale models with LEGO® Model Team! This advanced line featured true-to-life vehicles with working functions, opening doors, and authentic details. From trucks and airplanes to construction equipment, Model Team sets targeted adult builders seeking display-quality replicas. With complex building techniques and impressive final models, Model Team represented peak 1990s LEGO sophistication. Perfect for vehicle enthusiasts, adult collectors, and builders who love realistic, functional models.
themeDescriptions.Modulex: Professional building with LEGO® Modulex! This architectural planning system used smaller-scale bricks for professional architectural models and urban planning. Used by architects and developers, Modulex represented LEGO in professional design contexts. Though discontinued, Modulex showed LEGO's application beyond toys. Perfect for LEGO historians, architectural model enthusiasts, and collectors of specialized LEGO systems.
themeDescriptions.Monkie Kid: Discover ancient legends with LEGO® Monkie Kid™! Inspired by the classic Chinese tale Journey to the West, follow MK (Monkie Kid) as he discovers his destiny and battles the powerful Demon Bull King. Collect heroes like Mei, Pigsy, Mr. Tang, and Sandy, plus legendary figures like the Monkey King himself. Face off against villains like Macaque, Spider Queen, and the sinister Lady Bone Demon. This theme blends Chinese mythology with modern city life, creating a unique world of adventure. With detailed minifigures featuring beautiful printed designs and accessories inspired by traditional Chinese culture, Monkie Kid brings timeless legends to new generations.
themeDescriptions.Monster Fighters: Vanquish the undead with LEGO® Monster Fighters™ minifigures! This 2012 horror-themed series featured Victorian-era heroes battling classic movie monsters. Collect vampire hunters, scientists, and fighters facing Count Dracula, werewolves, mummies, zombies, ghosts, and Frankenstein's monster. Led by the intrepid Dr. Rodney Rathbone and his team, these heroes used moonstone power to defeat Lord Vampyre's evil plan to block out the sun. With gothic architecture, monsters, and steampunk technology, Monster Fighters delivered Halloween excitement year-round. Perfect for fans of classic Universal monsters, gothic horror, and Victorian-era supernatural adventures with LEGO creativity.
themeDescriptions.Muji: Minimalist building with LEGO® MUJI collaboration! These special sets combined MUJI's Japanese design philosophy with LEGO building. Featuring clean lines, simple designs, and understated aesthetics, MUJI sets celebrated minimalism through bricks. Perfect for design enthusiasts, MUJI fans, and collectors of Japan-exclusive LEGO collaborations.
themeDescriptions.NEXO KNIGHTS: Download hero powers with LEGO® NEXO KNIGHTS™ minifigures! This futuristic medieval theme (2016-2018) combined knights with digital technology. Collect Clay Moorington, Lance Richmond, Aaron Fox, Macy Halbert, and Axl as they defend the kingdom of Knighton from Jestro and his Book of Monsters. These minifigures featured detailed armor, shields with scannable NEXO Powers, and modern-medieval designs. Battle lava monsters, stone monsters, and digital villains with downloadable abilities via the NEXO KNIGHTS app. Blending fantasy, technology, and gaming, this theme pushed LEGO innovation. Perfect for fans who love knights, robots, and the fusion of medieval valor with futuristic technology.
themeDescriptions.NINJAGO: Master the art of Spinjitzu with LEGO® NINJAGO® minifigures! Join Kai, Jay, Cole, Zane, Lloyd, and Nya as they battle against the forces of evil threatening Ninjago City. From classic ninja training robes to advanced techno suits, collect dozens of variants for each ninja as they evolve through multiple seasons of adventures. Face legendary villains like Lord Garmadon, the Serpentine tribes, the Overlord, and the Skulkin army. Our NINJAGO collection includes minifigures from all seasons of the hit TV show, The LEGO NINJAGO Movie, and exclusive tournament fighters. With elemental powers, ancient weapons, and modern vehicles, these ninjas are ready for any battle. Perfect for fans who want to recreate epic showdowns or create their own Spinjitzu adventures.
themeDescriptions.Nike: Just build it with LEGO® Nike minifigures! This unique collaboration combined the world's leading athletic brand with LEGO. Though limited, Nike-themed sets and minifigures celebrated sports, athletics, and the iconic swoosh logo. These rare promotional figures often appeared in special retail partnerships or limited releases. Representing the intersection of sports culture and building toys, Nike collaborations targeted collectors and brand enthusiasts. With athletic gear, sporting equipment, and Nike branding, these figures merged two iconic brands. Such corporate collaborations remain unusual in LEGO history, making Nike figures especially collectible. Perfect for sneaker collectors, sports fans, brand collaboration enthusiasts, and anyone appreciating when two cultural icons unite for unique merchandise.
themeDescriptions.Ninja: Master stealth and combat with LEGO® Ninja minifigures! Separate from NINJAGO, this classic theme featured traditional ninja warriors in black outfits with martial arts weapons. From the 1990s and 2000s, these sets depicted historical Japanese ninja castles, training grounds, and battles. Collect ninja warriors, samurai, and feudal Japanese characters with authentic weapons like katanas, shurikens, and staffs. These figures emphasized historical accuracy over fantasy elements. From castles to dojos, Ninja sets delivered martial arts action. Though overshadowed by NINJAGO's popularity, classic Ninja remains beloved by collectors. These figures represented LEGO's interpretation of Japanese warrior culture. Perfect for martial arts enthusiasts, fans of historical themes, and collectors appreciating LEGO's take on legendary stealth warriors.
themeDescriptions.One Piece: Set sail for the Grand Line with LEGO® One Piece™ minifigures! Join Monkey D. Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates on their quest to find the legendary treasure. Collect Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper, Robin, Franky, Brook, and Jinbe, each with signature abilities and personality. These minifigures bring Eiichiro Oda's beloved manga and anime to LEGO with distinctive character designs, pirate ships, and adventures. From Devil Fruit powers to sword techniques, recreate epic battles and emotional moments from one of the world's best-selling manga series. Perfect for anime fans who dream of adventure, treasure, and the power of friendship on the high seas.
themeDescriptions.Overwatch: Heroes never die! LEGO® Overwatch™ minifigures bring Blizzard's team-based shooter to brick form. Collect iconic heroes like Tracer, Soldier: 76, Widowmaker, Reaper, D.Va, Winston, Genji, Hanzo, and more. These highly detailed figures capture each character's unique design, abilities, and personality from the game. Build payload escorts, control points, and iconic maps with LEGO sets featuring recognizable Overwatch locations. Though a limited run (2019-2020), these minifigures delivered game-accurate details for Overwatch fans. Perfect for players who main their favorite heroes and want to build the ultimate team composition in LEGO form.
themeDescriptions.Pharaoh's Quest: Uncover ancient curses with LEGO® Pharaoh's Quest™ minifigures! This 2011 adventure theme featured modern explorers awakening an ancient Egyptian pharaoh and his mummy army. Collect Professor Archibald Hale and his team as they race to collect golden treasures before the mummies claim them. Face the Golden King, mummy warriors, flying mummies, and scarab creatures. These minifigures combined Adventurers-style exploration with supernatural horror. With hidden treasures, cursed artifacts, and desert expeditions, Pharaoh's Quest delivered Egyptian mythology and adventure. Perfect for fans of archaeology, ancient Egypt, mummies, and the dangers of disturbing tombs that should remain sealed forever.
themeDescriptions.Pirates: Set sail for adventure with LEGO® Pirates minifigures! From classic Pirates of 1989 to modern-day buccaneers, these swashbuckling characters have been hunting treasure and battling on the high seas for decades. Collect brave Imperial Guards defending their forts, cunning pirates with eye patches and peg legs, and island natives protecting their homes. Our Pirates collection features notorious captains, loyal crew members, mysterious mermaids, and fearsome skeletons. Whether you're defending treasure islands, engaging in naval battles, or searching for buried gold, these detailed minifigures bring the golden age of piracy to life. Perfect for adventurers who love tales of the seven seas and hidden treasure.
themeDescriptions.Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead men tell no tales with LEGO® Pirates of the Caribbean™ minifigures! Based on Disney's blockbuster film franchise, sail with Captain Jack Sparrow, Will Turner, Elizabeth Swann, and Captain Barbossa. Battle Davy Jones and his cursed crew aboard the Flying Dutchman or search for treasure with Jack's distinctive swagger. These minifigures capture the films' characters with incredible detail - from Jack's dreadlocks and eyeliner to Davy Jones' octopus tentacles. Build iconic ships like the Black Pearl and recreate sword fights, supernatural curses, and pirate adventures. With supporting characters and mythical creatures from all films in the franchise, these figures bring Disney's pirate world to life. Perfect for fans of the movies, pirate enthusiasts, and collectors who love detailed licensed characters.
themeDescriptions.Pokémon: Catch 'em all with LEGO® Pokémon™ sets! Build your favorite Pokémon characters, trainers, and battle scenes from the beloved franchise. From Pikachu to legendary Pokémon, these sets bring the world of Pokémon adventures into LEGO form. Perfect for Pokémon fans, Nintendo collectors, and builders who grew up catching Pokémon.
themeDescriptions.Power Functions: Motorize your builds with LEGO® Power Functions! This electrical system includes motors, battery boxes, lights, and controllers that bring static models to life. Add movement to vehicles, activate mechanisms in buildings, and create remote-controlled creations. Power Functions transformed LEGO from static building to dynamic engineering. Perfect for builders adding motion to models, engineers exploring mechanics, and creators who want their builds to move.
themeDescriptions.Power Miners: Drill deep with LEGO® Power Miners™ minifigures! This 2009-2010 underground adventure theme featured miners excavating energy crystals while battling rock monsters. Collect the Power Miners team in distinctive orange and yellow mining gear with advanced drilling equipment and vehicles. Face rock monsters from the planet's core who eat energy crystals. These minifigures featured unique drilling tools, helmets with lights, and rugged explorer designs. From drill dozers to thunder drills, battle underground creatures in vast caverns. Power Miners combined geology, sci-fi, and adventure. Perfect for fans of underground exploration, mining, monsters, and digging to the center of the Earth.
themeDescriptions.Primo: Begin the journey with LEGO® Primo figures! Designed for infants and toddlers aged 6 months to 3 years, Primo (later absorbed into DUPLO) featured extra-large bricks safe for babies. These chunky, colorful figures introduced the youngest children to building through sensory play. Primo figures included simple characters and animals with no small parts, meeting strict safety requirements. With rounded edges and durable construction, these figures withstood teething, dropping, and rough play. Primo emphasized developmental benefits like hand-eye coordination and color recognition. Though merged into DUPLO, Primo represented LEGO's commitment to early childhood development. These figures marked babies' first introduction to the LEGO universe. Perfect for the youngest builders beginning their lifelong relationship with creative construction and imaginative play.
themeDescriptions.Prince of Persia: Rewind time with LEGO® Prince of Persia™ minifigures! Based on the 2010 film adaptation, collect Prince Dastan, Princess Tamina, and warriors from ancient Persia. These minifigures feature detailed Middle Eastern costumes, curved weapons, and accessories including the time-manipulating Dagger of Time. Build desert fortresses, engage in palace intrigue, and recreate parkour-style action sequences. Though a single-year tie-in theme, Prince of Persia delivered elaborate sets and detailed figures from Disney's fantasy adventure film. Perfect for fans of Arabian Nights-style adventures, time manipulation, and the Prince of Persia video game franchise that inspired the movie.
themeDescriptions.Project Hail Mary: Science saves humanity with LEGO® Project Hail Mary minifigures! Based on Andy Weir's science fiction novel, follow lone astronaut Ryder Grace on his desperate mission to save Earth. This LEGO Ideas set celebrates hard science fiction with detailed minifigures and scientific accuracy. From space travel to alien encounters, Project Hail Mary combines survival story with genuine scientific problem-solving. These minifigures represent characters from the book's gripping narrative about sacrifice, ingenuity, and interstellar friendship. With spacecraft and scientific equipment, recreate humanity's last hope against extinction. Perfect for fans of The Martian author Andy Weir, hard science fiction enthusiasts, and readers who love stories where intelligence and perseverance overcome impossible odds in realistic space exploration.
themeDescriptions.Promotional: Collect exclusive treasures with LEGO® Promotional minifigures! These special figures are never sold separately, only available through specific promotions, purchases, or events. From store giveaways to magazine subscriptions, mail-in offers to purchase incentives, promotional minifigures reward loyalty and drive engagement. Some celebrate holidays, others promote new theme launches or store openings. With limited distribution and time-sensitive availability, promotional figures become highly collectible. From polybag giveaways to free gifts with purchase, these exclusives range from common to extremely rare. Collectors hunt promotional figures through secondary markets, completing collections with these elusive pieces. Perfect for completists tracking down every variant, bargain hunters finding rare promotions, and fans who love the thrill of hunting exclusive releases.
themeDescriptions.Quatro: Supersized building for tiny hands with LEGO® Quatro figures! Designed for children aged 1-3, Quatro featured bricks even larger than DUPLO, prioritizing safety for the youngest builders. These oversized, chunky figures introduced toddlers to construction play with pieces too large to swallow. Quatro emphasized bright colors, simple shapes, and developmental benefits. From animals to basic characters, Quatro figures supported early learning through tactile play. Though discontinued and absorbed into DUPLO's youngest age ranges, Quatro represented LEGO's commitment to safety and early childhood development. These extra-large figures gave toddlers confidence building independently. Perfect for nostalgic parents who remember this short-lived line and collectors of LEGO's early childhood product history.
themeDescriptions.Queer Eye: Can you believe? LEGO® Queer Eye™ minifigures bring the Fab Five to brick form! Based on Netflix's beloved makeover show, collect Jonathan Van Ness, Tan France, Antoni Porowski, Bobby Berk, and Karamo Brown. This LEGO Ideas set celebrates positivity, self-care, and transformative kindness. Each minifigure captures the hosts' distinctive styles and personalities, from Jonathan's flowing hair to Tan's fashion expertise. Build the loft where transformations happen and recreate emotional makeovers that changed lives. With representation and inclusivity, Queer Eye minifigures celebrate being yourself. This set honors the show's message that everyone deserves to feel confident and loved. Perfect for fans of the show who believe in kindness, self-improvement, and celebrating what makes everyone unique and beautiful.
themeDescriptions.Racers: Feel the speed with LEGO® Racers minifigures! This high-octane theme (2001-2010) focused on racing vehicles across multiple competition types. Collect race car drivers, pit crew members, and mechanics from street racing, Formula racing, and off-road competitions. Racers featured sleek vehicles, starting gates, and racing accessories. Some sets included pullback motors or remote control functionality. These minifigures wore detailed racing suits with sponsor logos and team colors. From desert rally races to professional circuits, Racers delivered competitive speed. The theme also included Tiny Turbos - miniature pull-back racers. Though superseded by Speed Champions, Racers remains nostalgic for fans of early 2000s racing excitement. Perfect for speed enthusiasts and collectors of LEGO's racing heritage.
themeDescriptions.Rock Raiders: Mine the underground with LEGO® Rock Raiders™ minifigures! This 1999-2000 theme featured a stranded mining crew exploring an alien planet's cave systems. Collect the Rock Raiders team in distinctive yellow and blue mining suits with drilling equipment and vehicles. Mine energy crystals while avoiding rock monsters, cave-ins, and underground hazards. These minifigures pioneered underground exploration themes with unique tools and vehicles. From chromestone to energy crystals, extract resources while battling slimy rock monsters. Rock Raiders combined resource management gameplay with LEGO building. Perfect for fans of underground exploration, mining operations, and surviving hostile alien environments deep beneath the surface.
themeDescriptions.SPEED CHAMPIONS: Experience motorsport excellence with LEGO® SPEED CHAMPIONS minifigures! This theme delivers authentic racing with officially licensed vehicles from Ferrari, Porsche, McLaren, Lamborghini, Ford, and more. Collect professional race car drivers, pit crew members, and mechanics wearing real team colors and sponsor logos. SPEED CHAMPIONS features accurate racing suits, helmets, and equipment reflecting real motorsport teams. From Formula 1 to endurance racing, from classic cars to modern supercars, these sets celebrate automotive excellence. With detailed driver figures matching real race vehicles, fans can recreate historic races and legendary moments. The theme appeals to adult car enthusiasts with sophisticated building and authentic branding. Perfect for motorsport fans, car collectors, and anyone who loves the engineering and excitement of professional racing.
themeDescriptions.Samsonite: Discover LEGO history with Samsonite LEGO®! From 1964-1988, Samsonite manufactured LEGO sets for North American markets. These vintage sets featured unique packaging and sometimes different set numbers from European releases. Samsonite LEGO represents important company history and regional variations. Perfect for vintage collectors, LEGO historians, and fans of classic building sets from LEGO's growth era.
themeDescriptions.Scala: Fashion and lifestyle with LEGO® Scala minifigures! This theme (1997-2001, 2007-2009) targeted preteen girls with fashion dolls and lifestyle scenarios. Scala figures were larger than standard minifigures, featuring articulated bodies and detailed outfits. From shopping malls to bedrooms, horse stables to concerts, Scala depicted aspirational teenage life. These dolls emphasized fashion, friendship, and personal style with changeable clothes and accessories. While Scala used construction elements, the focus was dolls and play scenarios rather than building. Though discontinued, Scala represented LEGO exploring fashion doll markets. These figures bridged LEGO building with traditional doll play. Perfect for nostalgic collectors who loved fashion-forward LEGO and anyone interested in LEGO's history with targeting different demographics.
themeDescriptions.School Supplies: Get organized with LEGO® School Supplies! While not a traditional theme, this category includes functional school products featuring LEGO design - from pencil cases to lunchboxes, backpacks to stationery. Some products include exclusive minifigures or mini-builds. These collectibles merge practicality with LEGO fandom, letting students bring their passion to school. From erasers shaped like bricks to notebooks featuring classic minifigure designs, School Supplies keeps LEGO part of daily life. Licensed school supplies often include theme-specific designs from Star Wars to NINJAGO. Though primarily merchandise, exclusive minifigures packaged with school products become collectible. Perfect for students showing LEGO pride at school and collectors hunting minifigures in unexpected places.
themeDescriptions.Scooby-Doo: Zoinks! Solve mysteries with LEGO® Scooby-Doo™ minifigures! Join the Mystery Inc. gang - Scooby-Doo, Shaggy, Fred, Daphne, and Velma - as they unmask villains in the Mystery Machine. These minifigures capture the classic Hanna-Barbera character designs from 50+ years of mystery solving. Collect monsters like the Black Knight, Zombie, Mummy, Ghost, and Witch, then reveal the person underneath. Build haunted mansions, spooky lighthouses, and creepy locations. Scooby and Shaggy's cowardly reactions and appetite for Scooby Snacks shine through. Perfect for fans who grew up solving mysteries, chasing ghosts, and would have gotten away with it if not for those meddling kids!
themeDescriptions.Sculptures: Create art with LEGO® Sculptures! This advanced theme features large-scale, museum-quality builds of animals, objects, and artistic subjects. From life-size dinosaurs to iconic symbols, Sculptures push LEGO building into fine art territory.
