These impressive models serve as showpieces, conversation starters, and demonstrations of LEGO's artistic potential. Perfect for adult builders, art enthusiasts, and those seeking statement pieces that showcase LEGO craftsmanship.
themeDescriptions.Service Packs: Expand possibilities with LEGO® Service Packs! These supplementary sets include replacement parts, additional elements, and expansion pieces for existing sets. From extra wheels and windows to specialized pieces, Service Packs help builders repair, modify, and enhance their collections. Perfect for builders maintaining vintage sets, customizers needing specific pieces, and those extending the life of classic LEGO models.
themeDescriptions.Sonic the Hedgehog: Gotta go fast with LEGO® Sonic the Hedgehog™ minifigures! Speed through Green Hill Zone with Sonic, Tails, Amy Rose, and their friends as they battle the evil Dr. Eggman and his robot army. Collect iconic characters from SEGA's legendary franchise, including fan favorites and fearsome badniks like Buzz Bomber, Crabmeat, and Newtron. These minifigures capture the vibrant energy and attitude that made Sonic a gaming icon since 1991. From loop-de-loops to chaos emeralds, bring the high-speed action of Sonic games into your LEGO world. Perfect for retro gamers and new fans alike who love adventure, speed, and classic platforming action with attitude.
themeDescriptions.Space: Blast off to adventure with classic LEGO® Space minifigures! Since 1978, these pioneering astronauts have been exploring the cosmos, establishing bases on alien worlds, and encountering mysterious civilizations. Collect colorful space teams including Classic Space (white, red, yellow, blue), Blacktron, M-Tron, Space Police, Ice Planet 2002, Spyrius, and Insectoids. Each faction brings unique uniforms, vehicles, and missions to the final frontier. From peaceful explorers to space police chasing smugglers, these retro-futuristic minifigures capture the optimism and excitement of space exploration. Perfect for nostalgic builders and anyone who dreams of adventures among the stars with classic LEGO charm.
themeDescriptions.Speed Racer: Go Speed Racer, go! LEGO® Speed Racer™ minifigures bring the classic anime to brick form! Based on the 2008 film adaptation of the legendary Japanese series, collect Speed Racer, Racer X, Trixie, and the rest of the racing crew. These minifigures came with the iconic Mach 5 and other colorful racing vehicles from the visually stunning movie. Speed Racer sets featured the film's distinctive candy-colored aesthetic and futuristic racing technology. From family racing teams to corporate villains, the theme captured the movie's high-speed action. Though brief, Speed Racer delivered retro-futuristic racing excitement. Perfect for fans of the classic anime, 2008 movie enthusiasts, and collectors of LEGO's racing themes from beloved franchises.
themeDescriptions.Spider-Man: With great power comes great LEGO® Spider-Man™ minifigures! Before merging into Super Heroes, Spider-Man had dedicated themes featuring the wall-crawler and his rogues gallery. Collect Peter Parker, Mary Jane, villains like Green Goblin, Doctor Octopus, Venom, and more. These early 2000s sets captured Spider-Man swinging through New York City, battling enemies, and protecting citizens. From the classic films to comic book iterations, Spider-Man minifigures showcase the hero's evolution. With web-slinging accessories, masks, and detailed printing, Spidey figures deliver superhero action. Though now part of broader Marvel themes, standalone Spider-Man sets remain beloved. Perfect for fans of Marvel's most iconic hero who love neighborhood-friendly heroics, web-slinging action, and one of comics' greatest characters.
themeDescriptions.SpongeBob SquarePants: Are you ready? LEGO® SpongeBob SquarePants™ minifigures bring Bikini Bottom to life! Join SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward, Mr. Krabs, Sandy, and all your favorite underwater friends on wacky adventures beneath the sea. Collect characters in various expressions and outfits, from SpongeBob's classic optimistic grin to his shocked look and tongue-out concentration. These minifigures capture the absurd humor and heart that made SpongeBob a cultural phenomenon since 1999. Whether you're working at the Krusty Krab, jellyfishing in Jellyfish Fields, or causing chaos at the Chum Bucket, these figures bring nautical nonsense to your LEGO world. Perfect for fans who live in a pineapple under the sea.
themeDescriptions.Sports: Play ball with LEGO® Sports minifigures! This theme (2000-2007) featured basketball, soccer, hockey, and other athletic competitions. Collect players from different sports with jerseys, equipment, and accessories. Sports sets included buildable playing fields, goals, and stadiums with action features. These minifigures featured team colors and sporting gear from various competitions. Some sets included game mechanics with ball launchers and scoring mechanisms. From NBA basketball to FIFA soccer, Sports brought real athletic competitions to LEGO. Though discontinued, Sports pioneered licensed athletic themes and playable game elements. Perfect for sports fans, nostalgic collectors of early 2000s themes, and anyone who loves combining athletic competition with building creativity.
themeDescriptions.Spybotics: Program secret agents with LEGO® Spybotics! This robotics theme featured small programmable robots with spy themes. Using infrared communication and basic programming, Spybotics introduced children to robotics through espionage-themed missions. Though brief, Spybotics represented early LEGO educational robotics before MINDSTORMS became widespread. Perfect for robotics history enthusiasts, collectors of educational LEGO, and fans of early programmable LEGO systems.
themeDescriptions.Star Trek: Boldly build where no one has built before with LEGO® Star Trek™ minifigures! These rare figures bring Gene Roddenberry's legendary science fiction universe to LEGO. Though limited releases, Star Trek minifigures celebrate the franchise that defined television science fiction. Collect crew members from the USS Enterprise, including Captain Kirk and iconic characters from the various series. Star Trek's optimistic vision of humanity's future and exploration themes align perfectly with LEGO values. With Starfleet uniforms and spacecraft, recreate five-decade spanning adventures. Star Trek figures remain rare and highly collectible. Perfect for Trekkies who love LEGO, science fiction fans who grew up with the Federation, and collectors hunting crossover collaborations between legendary franchises.
themeDescriptions.Star Wars: One of the most iconic franchises in the galaxy, Star Wars™ has been captivating fans since 1977 - and our LEGO® Star Wars minifigures bring that galaxy far, far away right to your collection. From legendary Jedi like Luke Skywalker, Obi-Wan Kenobi, and Yoda to infamous Sith Lords like Darth Vader, Darth Maul, and Emperor Palpatine, every character tells a story. Build your army with clone troopers, stormtroopers, and rebel soldiers, or collect beloved droids like R2-D2™, C-3PO™, and BB-8. Our Star Wars minifigures span the Original Trilogy, Prequel Trilogy, Sequel Trilogy, and beyond - including characters from The Mandalorian™, Andor™, Ahsoka™, The Clone Wars™, and The Bad Batch™. Whether you're hunting for rare variants or building your ultimate Star Wars display, these minifigures capture every detail from the movies and shows that defined generations.
themeDescriptions.Stranger Things: Turn it upside down with LEGO® Stranger Things™ minifigures! Based on Netflix's hit sci-fi horror series, collect Eleven, Mike, Dustin, Lucas, Will, Joyce, and Hopper from the nostalgic 1980s-set show. The massive Stranger Things set features the Byers house in normal and Upside Down versions with incredible detail. These minifigures capture the show's characters with period-accurate 1980s clothing, hairstyles, and accessories. Face the Demogorgon and explore the supernatural mysteries of Hawkins, Indiana. Perfect for fans of 1980s nostalgia, supernatural mysteries, Dungeons & Dragons, and the beloved coming-of-age horror series that captivated audiences worldwide.
themeDescriptions.Studios: Lights, camera, action with LEGO® Studios minifigures! This innovative theme (2000-2003) let builders create their own movies using real LEGO sets and a included camera. Collect directors, camera operators, stunt performers, and actors across various film genres. From westerns to action films, monster movies to special effects, Studios celebrated filmmaking. Sets included production equipment, cameras, and green screens. These minifigures wore production crew outfits and Hollywood-inspired costumes. Studios represented LEGO entering multimedia creation before smartphones made filming commonplace. Though short-lived, it pioneered LEGO as storytelling medium. Perfect for nostalgic fans who remember making childhood movies with LEGO and aspiring filmmakers who love both cinema and building.
themeDescriptions.Super Heroes: Assemble the ultimate superhero collection with LEGO® Marvel and DC Super Heroes minifigures! From the Avengers to the Justice League, collect legendary heroes like Spider-Man, Iron Man, Captain America, Batman, Superman, and Wonder Woman. Face off against notorious villains including Thanos, The Joker, Lex Luthor, and Green Goblin. Our Super Heroes collection spans the entire Marvel Cinematic Universe and DC Extended Universe, featuring characters from blockbuster movies, classic comic books, and hit TV shows. Whether you're building the Infinity War saga, creating epic Batman vs Superman battles, or assembling your own superhero team, these detailed minifigures bring the action and excitement of superhero adventures right to your fingertips.
themeDescriptions.Super Mario: It's-a me, LEGO® Super Mario™! Jump into the Mushroom Kingdom with interactive minifigures featuring Mario, Luigi, Princess Peach, and their friends. These innovative figures combine traditional LEGO building with digital play, featuring LCD screens, speakers, and sensors that react to colors and barcodes. Collect enemies like Goombas, Koopa Troopas, Boo, and Bowser, plus power-ups and iconic course elements. Build custom levels, collect coins, and defeat villains just like the classic video games. With expansion sets covering multiple Mario games and series, create infinite platforming adventures. Perfect for Nintendo fans who grew up jumping, stomping, and collecting stars in gaming's most iconic franchise.
themeDescriptions.Technic: Experience engineering excellence with LEGO® Technic minifigures! While Technic sets focus on mechanical complexity and realistic functions, the minifigures represent skilled operators, pit crews, drivers, and technicians. These specialized figures often feature detailed racing suits, work uniforms, and professional gear. From Formula 1 drivers to construction equipment operators, Technic minifigures showcase the human element behind incredible machines. Though less common than traditional themes, these figures celebrate engineering, mechanics, and the people who operate complex machinery. Perfect for builders who appreciate technical excellence and want to add realistic scale and context to their Technic vehicle and machine collections.
themeDescriptions.Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Heroes in a half shell, LEGO® Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles™ minifigures bring turtle power to your collection! Join Leonardo, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Donatello as they protect New York City from the Shredder and the Foot Clan. Collect fan-favorite characters including Master Splinter, April O'Neil, Casey Jones, and villains like The Kraang, Dogpound, and Baxter Stockman. These minifigures capture the personality and attitude of each turtle brother, from Leo's leadership to Mikey's party dude energy. With detailed masks, weapons, and expressions, recreate classic sewer battles and rooftop showdowns. Perfect for TMNT fans who grew up on pizza, nunchucks, and cowabunga adventures.
themeDescriptions.The Angry Birds Movie: Slingshot into action with LEGO® The Angry Birds Movie™ minifigures! Based on the mobile game franchise and animated films, collect Red, Chuck, Bomb, Matilda, Terence, and the Bad Piggies. These minifigures translate the round, expressive birds into LEGO form with unique building techniques for their spherical shapes. Build Piggy City, Bird Island, and launch birds at structures just like the game. Though a brief theme (2016), these figures brought the addictive mobile gaming phenomenon to physical building. Perfect for fans of the games who've spent countless hours launching birds at pigs and toppling elaborate structures.
themeDescriptions.The Goonies: Goonies never say die! LEGO® The Goonies™ minifigures celebrate the classic 1985 adventure film. Collect Mikey, Chunk, Mouth, Data, Brand, Andy, and Stef as they search for One-Eyed Willy's treasure. Face the Fratellis - Ma, Francis, and Jake - plus the lovable Sloth. Available through LEGO Ideas, this detailed set captures the movie's iconic pirate ship and treasure-hunting adventure. These minifigures bring 1980s nostalgia and childhood adventure to life with period-accurate clothing and accessories. Perfect for fans of treasure hunts, booby traps, truffle shuffles, and the timeless story of kids on the adventure of a lifetime.
themeDescriptions.The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings: Journey to Middle-earth with LEGO® The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings™ minifigures! Collect Frodo, Aragorn, Gandalf, Legolas, Gimli, and the entire Fellowship. Face Sauron, Saruman, Uruk-hai, and the Witch-king. From Bilbo's adventure in The Hobbit to the War of the Ring, these minifigures span J.R.R. Tolkien's legendary fantasy epic. Build the Mines of Moria, Helm's Deep, Rivendell, and Mount Doom. With incredible detail in costumes, weapons, and hair pieces, these figures capture Peter Jackson's film adaptations. Perfect for fans of fantasy, epic quests, and the timeless battle between good and evil in literature's greatest adventure.
themeDescriptions.The Incredibles: Save the world with LEGO® The Incredibles™ minifigures! Based on Pixar's superhero family films, collect Mr. Incredible, Elastigirl, Violet, Dash, and Jack-Jack Parr. Face villains like Syndrome, the Underminer, and Screenslaver. These minifigures feature superhero suits, powers, and the Parr family's dynamics from both films. Build the Underminer's attack, the Incredible house, and recreate family superhero action. From super strength to elasticity to force fields, each family member brings unique abilities. Perfect for Pixar fans who love superheroes, family dynamics, and the challenges of balancing normal life with saving the world repeatedly.
themeDescriptions.The LEGO Movie: Everything is awesome with The LEGO® Movie™ minifigures! Join Emmet, Wyldstyle/Lucy, Batman, Unikitty, Benny, and MetalBeard as they fight to save the LEGO universe from Lord Business. Our LEGO Movie collection celebrates creativity, imagination, and the idea that anyone can be special. Collect heroes from Bricksburg, Cloud Cuckoo Land, and the Wild West, plus villains like Lord Business and his robot armies. These minifigures capture the humor, heart, and action of the hit animated films, from Master Builders to everyday citizens. Whether you're building to save the world or just having fun, these characters remind us that creativity has no limits.
themeDescriptions.The LEGO Movie 2: The sequel to awesome with The LEGO® Movie 2™ minifigures! Join Emmet, Lucy/Wyldstyle, Batman, Unikitty, and new friends facing the DUPLO invasion. Collect characters from Apocalypseburg, the Systar System, and beyond. Meet Rex Dangervest, Queen Watevra Wa'Nabi, Sweet Mayhem, and other new heroes and villains. These minifigures expand the LEGO Movie universe with even wilder designs and creativity. From post-apocalyptic warriors to sparkly musical characters, the sequel celebrates imagination without limits. Build elaborate vehicles, cities, and the sisters' different building styles. With more META humor and heart, these figures continue celebrating that everything is awesome when you build together. Perfect for families who loved the first movie and believe creativity means everyone's ideas matter.
themeDescriptions.The LEGO NINJAGO Movie: Find your inner ninja with The LEGO® NINJAGO® Movie minifigures! Based on the 2017 animated film, collect movie versions of Kai, Jay, Cole, Zane, Nya, and Lloyd facing new designs and storylines. Battle Lord Garmadon's army threatening Ninjago City with giant mechs and fearsome generals. These movie minifigures feature updated designs different from the TV series, with new costumes and accessories. From high school students to secret ninja warriors, the film balances humor with martial arts action. Build Ninjago City, temples, and elaborate mechs from the movie. With father-son themes and finding your destiny, these figures celebrate the theatrical LEGO NINJAGO adventure. Perfect for NINJAGO fans and families who loved the movie's humor and heart.
themeDescriptions.The Legend of Zelda: It's dangerous to go alone! LEGO® The Legend of Zelda™ minifigures bring Hyrule to life. Collect Link in his iconic green tunic, Princess Zelda, and face the dark power of Ganondorf. These minifigures celebrate one of gaming's most legendary franchises with detailed designs inspired by decades of adventures. From the Master Sword to the Triforce, build iconic locations and epic boss battles. Whether exploring dungeons, solving puzzles, or saving Hyrule, these figures honor the spirit of adventure that made Zelda a cornerstone of gaming history. Perfect for fans who've grown up with Link's quest to defeat evil and restore peace to the kingdom.
themeDescriptions.The Lone Ranger: Hi-Yo, Silver! LEGO® The Lone Ranger™ minifigures bring the Wild West hero to life. Based on the 2013 film, collect the Lone Ranger, his faithful companion Tonto, and villains like Butch Cavendish. These Western minifigures feature detailed period costumes, revolvers, and the Lone Ranger's iconic mask. Build trains, frontier towns, and desert shootouts in the Old West. Though a single-year theme tied to Disney's film, The Lone Ranger delivered classic Western action and adventure. Perfect for fans of Westerns, frontier justice, and the masked hero who fought for law and order across the American West.
themeDescriptions.The Powerpuff Girls: Sugar, spice, and everything nice! LEGO® The Powerpuff Girls™ minifigures bring the superhero sisters to Townsville. Collect Blossom, Bubbles, and Buttercup as they battle Mojo Jojo and defend their city. These minifigures capture Cartoon Network's distinctive animation style with unique printing and building techniques. Though a limited release through LEGO Dimensions and Ideas, Powerpuff Girls fans cherish these representations of the pint-sized heroes. From Chemical X to kindergarten to saving the day, these figures celebrate girl power and superhero action. Perfect for fans of the classic animated series who grew up with these powerful, adorable heroes.
themeDescriptions.The Simpsons: D'oh! Welcome to Springfield with LEGO® The Simpsons™ minifigures! America's favorite animated family comes to LEGO with Homer, Marge, Bart, Lisa, and Maggie, plus the entire cast of quirky neighbors and townspeople. Collect Mr. Burns, Smithers, Ned Flanders, Apu, Chief Wiggum, Krusty the Clown, Moe, and dozens more iconic characters. Available through Collectible Minifigure series and the legendary Simpsons House set, these yellow-skinned figures perfectly capture the show's humor and heart. From the Kwik-E-Mart to the nuclear power plant, build Springfield one minifigure at a time. Perfect for fans of television's longest-running sitcom who love satire, donuts, and animated chaos.
themeDescriptions.Time Cruisers: Travel through LEGO history with Time Cruisers™ minifigures! This small 1996-1997 theme featured Professor Millennium time-traveling through different LEGO eras. Collect time travelers visiting Castle knights, Pirates' ships, and Space astronauts across LEGO timelines. Time Cruisers celebrated LEGO's classic themes through cross-temporal adventures. These sets uniquely combined elements from different themes in one storyline. From medieval castles to outer space, Time Cruisers proved LEGO themes could interconnect. Though brief, the theme delivered a love letter to LEGO history. Perfect for nostalgic fans celebrating classic themes, collectors appreciating crossover sets, and anyone who loves time travel adventures connecting different eras of LEGO creativity and building.
themeDescriptions.Town: Experience everyday life with classic LEGO® Town minifigures! The predecessor to LEGO City, Town sets captured ordinary community life from 1978 through 2004. Collect police officers, firefighters, construction workers, doctors, shop owners, and regular citizens going about their daily lives. From gas station attendants to pizza delivery drivers, these minifigures represent the heart of any LEGO community. Town themes like Main Street, Paradisa, and Extreme Team showcase different eras of LEGO design philosophy. These nostalgic figures remind us that LEGO isn't just about fantasy - it's about celebrating the people and places that make communities thrive.
themeDescriptions.Toy Story: You've got a friend in LEGO® Toy Story™ minifigures! Bring Pixar's beloved franchise to life with Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Rex, Hamm, Slinky Dog, Bo Peep, and all of Andy's (and Bonnie's) toys. Collect characters from all four films, including villains like Lots-o'-Huggin' Bear and Gabby Gabby. These minifigures capture the heart and humor that made Toy Story a cultural phenomenon. Build Pizza Planet, Andy's Room, and Bonnie's house. From the original 1995 groundbreaking film to Toy Story 4's emotional conclusion, these figures celebrate friendship, growing up, and the magic of toys. Perfect for Pixar fans of all ages.
themeDescriptions.Train: All aboard with LEGO® Train minifigures! Since 1966, trains have carried passengers and cargo through LEGO worlds. Collect conductors, engineers, passengers, and railway workers from steam engines to modern high-speed trains. From classic blue rail to 9V powered tracks to current motorized systems, Train figures span LEGO history. Build station masters, cargo handlers, and commuters populating train systems. With steam locomotives, freight trains, passenger trains, and monorails, Train delivers transportation diversity. These figures represent the workers and travelers making railway systems function. Train sets combine engineering with playability, from simple push trains to complex automated layouts. Perfect for transport enthusiasts, collectors of LEGO's longest-running themes, and builders who love creating intricate railway networks.
themeDescriptions.Trolls World Tour: Get your glitter on with LEGO® Trolls World Tour™ minifigures! Based on DreamWorks' colorful animated films, collect Poppy, Branch, and the diverse troll tribes. These vibrant minifigures feature wild hair, bright colors, and the optimistic energy of the Trolls franchise. Build concert stages, pod homes, and musical adventures. With different music genres represented through various troll tribes, celebrate diversity and the power of music. Though a brief theme, Trolls delivered colorful building and positive messages. Perfect for young builders who love music, friendship, bright colors, and the infectious optimism that defines the Trolls universe.
themeDescriptions.Ultra Agents: Fight Antimatter with LEGO® Ultra Agents™ minifigures! This 2014-2015 sci-fi theme featured a team of specialized agents battling supervillains. Collect Agent Jack Fury, Agent Caila Phoenix, Agent Steve Zeal, and Agent Solomon Blaze as they face Psyclone, AntiMatter, Spyclops, and Toxikita. These minifigures featured futuristic designs, specialized weapons, and vehicles with advanced technology. From super speed to super strength, each villain had unique powers requiring tactical teamwork. Ultra Agents combined superheroes with sci-fi espionage. Perfect for fans of secret agents, team tactics, and battling supervillains with advanced technology and clever strategies.
themeDescriptions.Unikitty!: Build something awesome with LEGO® Unikitty!™ minifigures! From The LEGO Movie's breakout character comes a dedicated theme. Collect Unikitty, Puppycorn, Dr. Fox, Hawkodile, and Richard in various emotional states and adventures in the Cloud Kingdom. These minifigures feature buildable brick-built bodies and interchangeable expressions showing Unikitty's mood swings from happy to angry. Face Master Frown and Brock who want to make everyone sad. With bright colors, positive energy, and creative building, Unikitty celebrates imagination and emotions. Perfect for fans who love kawaii aesthetics, positivity, and the character who steals every scene with cuteness and rage.
themeDescriptions.Universal Building Set: Build anything with LEGO® Universal Building Sets! These classic sets from LEGO's early decades provided assorted bricks without specific themes or instructions. Emphasizing pure creativity, Universal Building Sets trusted builders to imagine and construct freely. Representing LEGO's original philosophy, these sets showcase the brand's foundation in open-ended play. Perfect for vintage collectors, LEGO purists who value creative freedom, and historians of toy design.
themeDescriptions.Universe: Explore space with LEGO® Universe minifigures! This MMORPG (2010-2012) let players create avatars and explore the LEGO multiverse online. Though the game ended, associated physical sets included minifigures from the game's universe. Collect heroes battling the Maelstrom corruption threatening creation itself. From Nexus Force factions to the villainous Stromlings, Universe featured original sci-fi storylines. These minifigures represented characters from the game's rich lore and player customization options. Universe pioneered massive online LEGO gameplay before LEGO Worlds and others. Though shut down, Universe remains beloved by players who explored its digital worlds. Perfect for nostalgic players who remember the MMORPG and collectors of LEGO's gaming history connecting physical and digital building.
themeDescriptions.Value Packs: Get more building with LEGO® Value Packs! These special bundles combine multiple sets at discounted prices, offering great value for expanding collections. From themed bundles to mixed assortments, Value Packs help builders grow their LEGO worlds economically. Perfect for gift-givers, budget-conscious builders, and parents stocking play areas.
themeDescriptions.Vidiyo: Drop the beat with LEGO® VIDIYO™ minifigures! This music-themed app-driven theme (2021-2021) combined physical minifigures with augmented reality music video creation. Collect BeatBits and band members creating music videos through smartphone apps. From pop stars to punk rockers, hip-hop artists to country singers, VIDIYO celebrated musical genres. These colorful minifigures featured unique designs, accessories, and stage presence. Scan minifigures and BeatBits to trigger effects, make music, and create shareable videos. Though extremely short-lived, VIDIYO represented LEGO experimenting with music, social media, and AR creativity. Perfect for collectors of discontinued themes and anyone interested in LEGO's bold experiments merging physical toys with digital music creation and social sharing.
themeDescriptions.Vikings: Raid and conquer with LEGO® Vikings™ minifigures! This 2005-2006 theme featured Norse warriors with detailed helmets, beards, weapons, and armor. Collect Viking raiders with horned helmets (historically inaccurate but iconically Viking) and face their enemies in medieval Scandinavian warfare. Build longships, fortresses, and battle scenes. Though brief, Vikings delivered historical action with LEGO's creative twist. These bearded warriors featured excellent detail in chainmail, weapons, and intimidating appearances. Perfect for fans of Norse history, Viking culture, raiders, and the seafaring warriors who shaped medieval European history with their legendary raids and exploration.
themeDescriptions.Wednesday: It's always Monday with LEGO® Wednesday™ minifigures! Based on Netflix's hit series, collect Wednesday Addams, Enid Sinclair, Thing, and characters from Nevermore Academy. These minifigures capture Wednesday's gothic aesthetic, Enid's colorful personality, and the show's dark humor. Build locations from the supernatural school and recreate mystery-solving adventures. With incredible detail in Wednesday's braids, Thing's disembodied hand, and the show's Tim Burton-esque style, these figures bring the viral sensation to LEGO. Perfect for fans of gothic mystery, supernatural schools, coming-of-age stories, and the Addams family's most famous daughter.
themeDescriptions.Western: Saddle up with LEGO® Western minifigures! This classic theme brought the Wild West to LEGO with cowboys, cavalry, and Native Americans. From the original 1990s Western sets to revivals, collect sheriffs, outlaws, cavalry soldiers, and frontier townspeople. Build saloons, cavalry forts, bandit hideouts, and frontier towns. These minifigures featured Western gear including cowboy hats, rifles, horses, and wagons. Western delivered shootouts, gold rush adventures, and frontier life. Though discontinued, Western remains nostalgic for fans of cowboy adventures and frontier history. With detailed western buildings and characters, these sets captured the American frontier era. Perfect for fans of western movies, frontier history enthusiasts, and collectors appreciating LEGO's take on cowboys, outlaws, and life in the Old West.
themeDescriptions.Wicked: Defy gravity with LEGO® Wicked™ minifigures! Based on the phenomenally successful Broadway musical and films, collect Elphaba (the Wicked Witch of the West) and Glinda the Good in their stunning costumes. These minifigures celebrate the untold story of the Witches of Oz before Dorothy arrived. With elaborate dresses, distinctive looks, and theatrical designs, recreate iconic moments from the musical. From Shiz University to the Emerald City, build the world of Oz reimagined. Perfect for theater fans, musical lovers, and anyone enchanted by the story of friendship, standing up for what's right, and the origins of Oz's most famous witches.
themeDescriptions.World Racers: Race around the world with LEGO® World Racers™ minifigures! This 2010 racing theme featured teams competing in exotic global locations. Collect racers from Team Xtreme and their rivals in high-speed competitions through deserts, jungles, ice fields, and cities worldwide. These minifigures featured distinctive racing suits, helmets, and attitude. Build extreme vehicles designed for rough terrain and intense racing action. Though a single-year theme, World Racers delivered international racing excitement with diverse settings. Perfect for racing fans who love extreme vehicles, global adventure, and competition-driven action across Earth's most challenging environments.
themeDescriptions.X-Pod: Carry building adventures in LEGO® X-Pods! These portable, spherical containers held small themed builds that could be constructed, displayed, and stored in their unique cases. X-Pods combined building with collectible packaging, creating pocket-sized adventures. Though discontinued, X-Pods represented innovative thinking about LEGO packaging and portability. Perfect for collectors of unique LEGO packaging, fans of compact builds, and those who remember this creative early 2000s experiment.
themeDescriptions.Znap: Connect in new ways with LEGO® Znap! This experimental 1990s system featured flexible beam-and-panel construction different from traditional brick building. Znap sets created skeletal structures, vehicles, and creatures using hinged connections. Though unsuccessful commercially, Znap showed LEGO's willingness to explore alternative building systems. Perfect for LEGO historians, collectors of failed experiments, and fans of LEGO's innovative attempts beyond standard bricks.
themeDescriptions.xtra: Enhance your worlds with LEGO® xtra! These accessory sets include extra elements, scenery pieces, and details for customizing existing builds. From street signs and plants to furniture and decorations, xtra sets add life and realism to LEGO cities and scenes. Perfect for builders adding detail to displays, city builders seeking realism, and those who love accessorizing their LEGO worlds.
